programme.title: Investing in China to Share the Future
programme.desc: Against the backdrop of a new landscape of globalization, the strategies of foreign-invested enterprises in China have undergone a profound transformation. The continued growth of China and Asia has enabled even greater possibilities for foreign enterprises. CGTN host Lily Lyu moderates the panel discussion themed “Investing in China to Share the Future” at the Boao Forum for Asia this year, engaging in discussions with representatives on how foreign enterprises can position China and Asia as key hubs for innovation through deep, multi-dimensional integration. #BoaoForum2026#

programme.title: World Sleep Day special: China's sleep economy 'awakening' new consumer trends
programme.desc: This episode of BizTalk explores China's fast-growing sleep economy – from smart mattresses and sleep aids to tracking technology and health management, the demand for better sleep is on the rise. CGTN's Lincoln Humphries speaks with Aleksey Efremov, senior vice president of IKEA China; Wang Jin, leader of McKinsey's Life Sciences & Healthcare Practice in China; and David Yuen, managing director of TEMPUR China, on what’s driving this trend.

programme.title: World Sleep Day special: China's sleep economy 'awakening' new consumer trends
programme.desc: This episode of BizTalk explores China's fast-growing sleep economy – from smart mattresses and sleep aids to tracking technology and health management, the demand for better sleep is on the rise. CGTN's Lincoln Humphries speaks with Aleksey Efremov, senior vice president of IKEA China; Wang Jin, leader of McKinsey's Life Sciences & Healthcare Practice in China; and David Yuen, managing director of TEMPUR China, on what’s driving this trend.

programme.title: World Sleep Day special: China's sleep economy 'awakening' new consumer trends

programme.title: Conversations on Asia's shared future as Boao Forum 2026 concludes
programme.desc: The Boao Forum for Asia 2026 Annual Conference draws to a close on Friday. As global economic uncertainty continues to rise, how can Asia build greater consensus and expand avenues for cooperation? Which topics at this year's forum resonated the most and left a lasting impression? At the close of the forum, CGTN and SSTV reporters gather for an in-depth conversation—reflecting on key moments and sharing insights.

programme.title: Investing in China to Share the Future
programme.desc: Against the backdrop of a new landscape of globalization, the strategies of foreign-invested enterprises in China have undergone a profound transformation. The continued growth of China and Asia has enabled even greater possibilities for foreign enterprises. CGTN host Lily Lyu moderates the panel discussion themed “Investing in China to Share the Future” at the Boao Forum for Asia this year, engaging in discussions with representatives on how foreign enterprises can position China and Asia as key hubs for innovation through deep, multi-dimensional integration. #BoaoForum2026#

programme.title: Insight
programme.sub-title: S01 : E36 India Dreams Of Space
programme.desc: India has become one of the leading space-faring nations, at a time when the superpower space race is heating up. Can India's space sector take off, or will it be a failure to launch?

programme.title: Undercover Asia S7
programme.desc: In 2018 China stops importing recyclables, creating global chaos and flooding Southeast Asian countries with unwanted plastic. For Indonesia, battling its own waste problems, is this the last straw?

programme.title: Power Scramble
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Why The Rush For Rare Earths?
programme.desc: A worldwide scramble for rare earth metals broke out. Just why does China have such a grip on them? And why the worry? Well we need them not just for iPhones, but for everything electric in our lives...

programme.title: The Lightbulb Moment
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 CUBICLE | How the Cubicle Became Universally Hated
programme.desc: A futuristic designer, Robert Propst, dreamed up “The Action Office” as a workplace utopia that would unleash the modern knowledge worker’s vast untapped potential.

programme.title: The Lightbulb Moment
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 BARCODE | How The Barcode Shaped Our Modern Economy
programme.desc: Barcodes have radically changed global commerce, helping fuel the rise of everything from massive companies like Walmart to world powers like China.

programme.title: The Lightbulb Moment
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 FLORIDA | How Real Estate Rogues Invented Florida As We Know It
programme.desc: In the 1920s, an army of real estate boosters set out to redefine Florida from an economic backwater to a vacation hotspot.

programme.title: The Lightbulb Moment
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 MAUVE | The Fake Color That Made Our Modern World
programme.desc: In 1856, a chemistry student accidentally created a strange substance with a rich purple hue -- the world’s first synthetic dye.

programme.title: The Lightbulb Moment
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 VANILLA | The Bean That Shaped the Future of Food
programme.desc: In 1841 on the small island of Réunion, a 12-year-old slave did something no one had done before; artificially pollinate the vanilla plant.

programme.title: The Lightbulb Moment
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 WIFI | The Hollywood Actress Who Laid the Groundwork For Wi-Fi
programme.desc: Actress Hedy Lamarr, “the world's most beautiful woman,” had a knack for inventing. During WWII, she devised a technology designed to intercept Axis communications.

programme.title: The Lightbulb Moment
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 STREAMING | The Invention That Revolutionized Streaming Video
programme.desc: The early days of online video were plagued by low resolution, stamp-sized video, and unbearable buffering times. But one day that all changed.

programme.title: The Lightbulb Moment
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 INTERSTATE | How The Interstate Connected and Divided America
programme.desc: Dwight Eisenhower’s interstate highway system was the biggest infrastructure project of its time, a bold plan to connect all corners of America.

programme.title: The Lightbulb Moment
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 EDISON | How Edison Reinvented Invention
programme.desc: Edison pioneered the world’s first research and development center in Menlo Park, New Jersey.

programme.title: The Lightbulb Moment
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 LIKE BUTTON | The Unintended Consequences of the Facebook Like Button
programme.desc: When first presented with the like button (then dubbed “the awesome button”) Facebook CEO Mark Zuckerberg had a simple response: “No.”

programme.title: Nature Through Her Eyes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Call Of The Wild
programme.desc: Childhood curiosity can build a lifelong passion for the natural world. What is special about women’s connection to the wild?

programme.title: Nature Through Her Eyes
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Who Tells The Story?
programme.desc: Many of nature’s greatest champions are women. Can their storytelling help restore balance to a troubled world?

programme.title: Nature Through Her Eyes
programme.desc: Our stories of the wilderness have traditionally been told by white men. But in recent decades pioneering women have overcome obstacles to make their voices heard.

programme.title: Nature Through Her Eyes
programme.desc: Partnerships between men and women, young and old, black and white, give us a fresh appreciation for the creatures we share this earth with.

programme.title: The Tracker's Diary: Bears of Katmai
programme.desc: In Katmai National Park, Alaska a massive population of coastal brown bears gather to eat salmon as they migrate back to the rivers and streams where they were born.

programme.title: The Tracker's Diary: Bears of Katmai
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Fish Like a Bear
programme.desc: The crew heads inland to a section of the river to observe the many different families as they fish.

programme.title: The Tracker's Diary: Bears of Katmai
programme.desc: During a lull in bear and salmon activity, Casey and the crew decide to head inland in search of the spawning fish.

programme.title: The Tracker's Diary: Bears of Katmai
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 The Wolf and The Storm
programme.desc: After seeing a wolf in the distance and tracks on the shore, the crew head inland in search of more clues to the wolf's whereabouts.

programme.title: The Tracker's Diary: Bears of Katmai
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Neighbors, Old and New
programme.desc: Casey and the crew go out in search of the family of the lost cub from the previous night. They hope that if they find them, the cub will have found them as well.

programme.title: The Tracker's Diary: Bears of Katmai
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 No Place Like Home
programme.desc: As the end of their expedition draws near, salmon and bear activity begins to decline, but that doesn’t mean that there aren’t some bears still lingering around the area.

programme.title: The Secret Lives Of Big Cats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 The Secret Lives Of Jaguars
programme.desc: The first jaguar scientists struggled to go anywhere near their subjects. But times have changed.

programme.title: The Secret Lives Of Big Cats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 The Secret Lives Of Cheetahs
programme.desc: First, cheetahs are daytime hunters with eyesight optimized for open landscape and distant prey. Second, they're possibly the fastest land animals that have ever lived.

programme.title: The Secret Lives of Sharks
programme.desc: Travel to South Africa, one of the world's great shark hot spots, as Andy Casagrande observes the iconic great white shark and its behavior when hunting fur seals.

programme.title: The Secret Lives of Sharks
programme.desc: Travel to the Bahamas as Andy Casagrande attempts to place a fin camera on the elusive hammerhead shark… what could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: The Secret Lives of Sharks
programme.desc: Wildlife filmmaker Andy Casagrande travels off the coast of North Carolina to document never before seen behavior of one of the most misunderstood sharks in the world.

programme.title: The Secret Lives Of Big Cats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Secret Lives Of Tigers
programme.desc: Siberian tigers are the largest of all cats. Over the last century, they've experienced an almost total population crash, and at least 97% of those tigers have gone.

programme.title: The Secret Lives Of Big Cats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 The Secret Lives Of Snow Leopards
programme.desc: Often referred to as the gray ghost or ghost of the mountains, this animal's rarity and elusiveness was legendary.

programme.title: The Secret Lives Of Big Cats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 The Secret Lives Of Pumas
programme.desc: These cats are much more closely related to cheetahs than lions. While pumas are often found in mountains, they're also found in the lowlands, dense forests, or deserts.

programme.title: The Secret Lives Of Big Cats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 The Secret Lives Of Lions
programme.desc: There are now thought to be fewer than 15,000 lions remaining in Kenya's Masai Mara, a drop of 75% in 50 years.

programme.title: The Secret Lives Of Big Cats
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 The Secret Lives Of Leopards
programme.desc: The leopard is a master of secrecy. It's one of the hardest of all big cats to see, let alone observe. Mainly because leopards need absolute invisibility to hunt.

programme.title: The Secret Lives Of Big Cats

programme.title: JFK: Fact & Fable
programme.desc: Television made John Kennedy the ultimate celebrity during his presidency. However, the JFK we remember is the one his wife, Jackie, created after his death.

programme.title: Presidents In Crisis
programme.desc: Before they led America through national crises, Presidents Abraham Lincoln, Franklin Roosevelt and Lyndon Johnson were all transformed by personal trauma. Historian Doris Kearns Goodwin reveals the all too human men who became legends.

programme.title: American Icons
programme.desc: A century after he transformed baseball, celebrity culture, and the American experience, the Babe, the Sultan of Swat, the Bambino - Babe Ruth remains.

programme.title: American Icons
programme.desc: Franklin Delano Roosevelt is remembered for overcoming the toughest possible challenges. Staring down the Depression, staring down the Nazis, saving democracy. He would remake the world and at the same time conquer his own personal limitations.

programme.title: American Icons
programme.desc: A man who had no education, no money, came from no background of anything meaningful, and yet he would rise to become the President of the United States.

programme.title: American Icons
programme.desc: Known as the First Lady of the World, Eleanor Roosevelt was a leader in her own right and involved in numerous humanitarian causes throughout her life.

programme.title: American Icons
programme.desc: He wasn't always the greatest strategist and tactician, and he actually made a lot of mistakes early on. But George Washington was a leader unlike any other.

programme.title: American Icons
programme.desc: Thomas Edison had no small ego and liked to promote himself as a lone inventor. But you can't take out 1100 patents in your lifetime by yourself. Instead, he built the first research and development laboratory, decades before anyone else in America understood the value of such a collaboration.

programme.title: American Icons
programme.desc: The secret of Twain's success was that he echoed and reflected a longing of all sorts of people. Mark Twain became the most popular voice in America.

programme.title: American Icons
programme.desc: Colonial America had no freedom of religion, the men who signed the Declaration of Independence hated each other. The reason you don’t know those facts? Thomas Jefferson.

programme.title: American Icons
programme.desc: Explore the personal side of the man who brought animated characters to life, revolutionized entertainment, and saw the future as a magical place with many possibilities.

programme.title: The Mighty Atom
programme.desc: This documentary feature chronicles the amazing life story of Joseph Greenstein, “The Mighty Atom – Strongest Man In The World”.

programme.title: The Last Persian Shah
programme.desc: Shah Mohammad Reza Pahlavi would have been 100 years in October 2019. The Shah's story begins with good ideas and ideals and ends in bloody chaos.

programme.title: JFK: Fact & Fable
programme.desc: Television made John Kennedy the ultimate celebrity during his presidency. However, the JFK we remember is the one his wife, Jackie, created after his death.

programme.title: Presidents In Crisis
programme.desc: Before they led America through national crises, Presidents Abraham Lincoln, Franklin Roosevelt and Lyndon Johnson were all transformed by personal trauma. Historian Doris Kearns Goodwin reveals the all too human men who became legends.

programme.title: American Icons
programme.desc: A century after he transformed baseball, celebrity culture, and the American experience, the Babe, the Sultan of Swat, the Bambino - Babe Ruth remains.

programme.title: American Icons
programme.desc: Franklin Delano Roosevelt is remembered for overcoming the toughest possible challenges. Staring down the Depression, staring down the Nazis, saving democracy. He would remake the world and at the same time conquer his own personal limitations.

programme.title: American Icons
programme.desc: A man who had no education, no money, came from no background of anything meaningful, and yet he would rise to become the President of the United States.

programme.title: American Icons
programme.desc: Known as the First Lady of the World, Eleanor Roosevelt was a leader in her own right and involved in numerous humanitarian causes throughout her life.

programme.title: American Icons
programme.desc: He wasn't always the greatest strategist and tactician, and he actually made a lot of mistakes early on. But George Washington was a leader unlike any other.

programme.title: American Icons
programme.desc: Thomas Edison had no small ego and liked to promote himself as a lone inventor. But you can't take out 1100 patents in your lifetime by yourself. Instead, he built the first research and development laboratory, decades before anyone else in America understood the value of such a collaboration.

programme.title: American Icons
programme.desc: The secret of Twain's success was that he echoed and reflected a longing of all sorts of people. Mark Twain became the most popular voice in America.

programme.title: American Icons
programme.desc: Colonial America had no freedom of religion, the men who signed the Declaration of Independence hated each other. The reason you don’t know those facts? Thomas Jefferson.

programme.title: American Icons
programme.desc: Explore the personal side of the man who brought animated characters to life, revolutionized entertainment, and saw the future as a magical place with many possibilities.

programme.title: The Mighty Atom
programme.desc: This documentary feature chronicles the amazing life story of Joseph Greenstein, “The Mighty Atom – Strongest Man In The World”.

programme.desc: Wherever we find patterns and symmetry in nature, we also find that nature conforms to certain rules. Rules that combine elegance with efficiency.

programme.title: Nature's Mathematics

programme.title: Bright Now
programme.desc: Adaptations in the oceans most colorful invertebrates. Nudibranchs, or sea slugs, have a remarkable range of adaptations to survive in the ocean. From weaponizing stinging cells, harvesting the power of the sun, spraying sulfuric acid, and turning their bodies into drift nets.

programme.desc: The staff of South Africa’s Manyoni Private Game Reserve passionately care for some of the world’s most exotic and endangered wild animals.

programme.desc: Crystal River has long been a safe haven for the Florida manatee, but when an invasive algae wiped out the eelgrass that manatees need for food, the community rallied to restore the river and save the animals that call it home.

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: Coral reefs around the world are threatened by rising ocean temperatures, but hope is growing off the coast of Hawaii. There, researchers at the Coral Resilience Lab selectively breed corals to withstand ever-increasing amounts of heat stress.

programme.title: Cornwall's Climate Stories
programme.desc: Highlighting the impacts of climate change already being felt around the county of Cornwall - and meeting the inspiring people, communities and researchers working to tackle it.

programme.title: Cornwall's Climate Stories
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Living on the Edge
programme.desc: A passionate ultra-runner travels around the Cornish coast path, witnessing the ever-increasing impacts of coastal erosion.

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: All around the world, seabirds provide a critical link between land and sea. On Hawai’i, ecologists are working to protect two vital shearwater species that helped life first take hold across these islands.

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: On Panama’s remote Pearl Islands, marine biologist Callie Veelenturf is using her research on endangered sea turtles to help the country enshrine the rights of nature into law—and help the communities living there protect their own environment and livelihood.

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: A decade after a momentous dam removal, salmon are helping revive a lost U.S. ecosystem.

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: Farmers grow coffee to save a rainforest that’s crucial to local communities and wildlife.

programme.title: Cornwall's Climate Stories
programme.desc: This episode delves deep into issues around climate change and Cornwall’s fresh water – looking at everything from heavier rain leading to more sewage overflows, flooding and loss of topsoil, to how warmer river water is affecting fish, and the surprising carbon footprint of the water we use every day.

programme.title: Cornwall's Climate Stories
programme.desc: We’ve all heard headlines heralding the meat and dairy industry as the villains of the climate crisis, but is this really true?

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: Australian scientists enlist conservation dogs to save threatened native species.

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: In the middle of Rio de Janeiro sits the world’s largest urban rainforest: Tijuca National park. To combat a century of deforestation and hunting, a team of researchers are repairing the forest’s forgotten web of life, one species at a time.

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: In Brazil’s Atlantic Forest, Mauricio Ruiz has turned his love for nature into action by working with the community to reforest a critical stretch of the nation’s most endangered forest, and by using drones to help him reach his goal of planting 15 million trees.

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: Fernanda Abra leads a crucial conservation initiative along the roadways of Brazil, where vehicles annually kill about 475 million vertebrates - more than double the country’s human population.

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 The Great Ocean Cleanup
programme.desc: Inventor Boyan Slat is on a mission to rid oceans of plastic.

programme.title: Cornwall's Climate Stories
programme.desc: Today's industrialised food system causes a huge amount of our carbon emissions - and we waste one-third of all the food produced.

programme.title: Groundwork
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Groundwork Ep1 - “Cotton”, A Family Journey into Regenerative Cotton
programme.desc: Shifting from conventional farming practices to regenerative agriculture takes courage.

programme.title: Mutinda
programme.desc: The transformational story of Kenya’s once most wanted Poacher, Mutinda Ndivo.

programme.title: Consciousness of Culture
programme.desc: Bruce Parry highlights the moments of his life that formed his career and life passion tochampion indigenous cultures around the world through exploration and film. Bruce isinterested in altered states of mind, and the creation of myths, why do we think what wethink? And what life phenomena and environments sculpt these ideas?

programme.title: The Nature of All Things
programme.desc: What is it that makes things what they are? Where does it come from? For ProfessorSeyyed Hossein Nasr, the quest for knowledge, specifically knowledge which enablesman to understand the true nature of things and which furthermore, �liberates anddelivers him from the fetters and limitations of earthly existence,� has been (andcontinues to be) the central concern and determinant of how we understand and live ourlives.

programme.title: Astrology Zone
programme.desc: Susan Miller is the founder and astrologist for AstrologyZone.com. The trusted,twenty-year-old platform provides the latest in intelligent astrological trends. Thisdiscussion with Deepak Chopra breaks down many popular misconceptions aboutastrological predictions, the various disciplines of study, ego, and consciousness inrelation to astrology. Miller also outlines the golden rule to understanding and getting themost out of astrological predications: astrology shows the condition, but not theoutcome�that outcome is completely up to you. �I can give you questions to ask to helpyou decide, but in the end, you write the script of your life.�

programme.title: Modern Metaphysical Idealism
programme.desc: Dr. Bernardo Kastrup, philosopher and author has been leading the modernrenaissance of metaphysical idealism. His theoretical reflections on the mind explainconsciousness as the only element of life that allows us to understand reality, andeverything we know about reality is subject to our experiences. This idea is often refutedby the thought that the brain is the source, not images and experiences provided byconsciousness.

programme.title: Nature, Space and Matter
programme.desc: Our understanding of the nature of time, space and matter have changed�even whatwe mean by these terms�in just the last few decades. Our interpretations continue tochange and more theories form as we learn and study these topics. Dr. Fred Alan Wolfexplains the origins of many of these foundational theories that have formed at differenttimes and why they came about. Before quantum physics, people knew that humanbeings were conscious. We knew that animals were conscious. But now, with newrevelations in quantum physics we begin to see a new role for consciousness.

programme.title: Creation Is Constant
programme.desc: Duane Elgin wants to show that the universe is a living field of existence, and that weare always in communion with a field of aliveness whether we are conscious of it or not.Throughout this lecture, Elgin explains his belief that in a living system, each part isintegral to the whole, so each entity is intimately connected to the entire universe. Tohim, creation is not something that happened with the Big Bang. Instead, creation isconsistently forming around us from a deeper abyss. The universe�s existence isbrought moment by moment through this continuous, moving process.

programme.title: The Sobras Institute
programme.desc: Kleopatra Ormos, M.D., Founder of the Sobras Institute, has spent her career refiningmethods that integrate principles of neuroscience, psychiatry, ancient medical andspiritual practices, nutrition, and exercise to help her clients improve their emotional andphysical health, and their personal and professional performance. The Sobras Instituteis a private research and teaching institute offering experiential workshops and privatecoaching for developing practical self-support skills for sustainable mental, emotionaland physical well-being. She discusses her research and life�s work at length in thisdiscussion with Deepak Chopra.

programme.title: Mind-Body Healing
programme.desc: In the �60s, James Gordon began self-seeking the broader dimensions of his mind and ifyoga, meditation and other methods to supplement his psychotherapy sessions, whichleft him satisfied but curious. He started taking it seriously for himself and the shift alsoreflected in his career. Dr. Gordon created ground-breaking programs of comprehensivemind-body healing for physicians, medical students, and other health professionals, andpeople with cancer, depression and other chronic illnesses. Mind-body medicine isbased on the scientific understanding of the inextricable connection between our innerselves and the social and natural world in which we live.

programme.title: Cosmopsychism
programme.desc: This episode of Curious Minds with Yujin Nagasawa discusses the unique idea of�cosmopsychism�; an idea which argues our personal conscious experiences aresegments of a larger consciousness that belongs to the cosmos. Yujin Nagasawa�s lifework lies in the mystery of consciousness, existence and the philosophy of religion. Thiscontroversial conversation with Deepak Chopra uncovers new theories andexplanations for consciousness, as they strive to uncover truth.

programme.title: Book Of Knowledge
programme.desc: Traveling the world 30+ years, David Verdesi finds himself back in Rome. Urged to uncover thereason behind the instinctive human desire for spiritual yearning, Verdesi starts retracing theintersection of science and theology within the city his family has called home since the early1400s.Vibrating from the walls of the city�s sacred spaces, he discovers findings of oral history,predating the beginning of humanity by thousands of years. Documents and rare rituals thatupend conventional ideas of the behaviors of the mind in ancient times. Narratives heavilyinfluenced by civilizations and cultures beyond Rome, continue to influence the moral compassof life today, Verdesi realizes he...

programme.title: Across the Ice
programme.desc: After 45+ expeditions throughout over 150+ countries, one of the world's leadingadventurers and visionaries of conservation, Swedish explorer Johan Ernst Nilsondawns upon his biggest adventure yet. Follow his journey across the planet from theNorth Pole to the South Pole in Pole2Pole. The 525 day mostly carbon-neutral trekcovers 20,000 miles by means of skis, dogsled, boat, bike and kite. Pole2Pole is notonly one of the most difficult adventures he�s ever attempted, but also one of his mostphilanthropic adventures. Johan visits charities along the way to share their stories andraise global awareness.

programme.title: Chasing Bliss
programme.desc: Water is life, and the great conductor that connects us all. The oceans cover over 70%of our planet and hold almost 97% of the earth's water. True bliss in constant movementgiving life around the globe. This is a story of an eclectic mix of people across Hawaii,Ecuador and the USA, who draw energy from this life force and channel it positively intotheir everyday lives. Join Paulino in understanding what drives Surfer Laid Hamilton, orfilmmaker Robert Greaves, Big-Wave World Champion Paige Alms and WindsurfingWorld Record Holder Sarah Hauser. Coffee Farmer Anti Clancy, Dr Greg Mitchell,Research Scientist & Algae Visionary at Scripps.

programme.title: Particle Physics
programme.desc: At only 21, Frank Wilczek, a graduate student at Princeton University, defined theproperties of color gluons, which hold atomic nuclei together while working with DavidGross. He is known, among other things, for the discovery of asymptotic freedom, thedevelopment of quantum chromodynamics, the invention of axions, and the discoveryand exploitation of new forms of quantum statistics (anyons).

programme.title: Connections Between Science & Philosophy
programme.desc: Dr. Menas Kafatos is internationally known for bridging the disciplines, writing andlecturing extensively on the convergence between science and philosophy, as there isan inherent need for a dialogue between science, spirituality, and religion. His book, Creating Cosmos with Deepak Chopra discusses the melding of topics like inflation,environmental issues, natural hazards, quantum theory and consciousness.

programme.title: Iranian Space Pioneer
programme.desc: Iranian electrical engineer, entrepreneur and former astronaut, Anousheh Ansari wasthe first female private space explorer to fly to the International Space Station. Sheexplains the challenging journey and the determination needed to reach space afterimmigrating to the U.S. from Iran. She also became the first person to publish a blogfrom space. The content invited readers to share her experience with the world. Shedescribed the Russian Soyuz capsule during liftoff, talked about the sights and smells ofthe space station, and explained the intricacies of everyday activities.

programme.title: Philosopher of the Mind
programme.desc: Dr. Paavo Pylkk�nen�s eclectic approach combines new physics-based insights withthose of analytical philosophy, phenomenology, cognitive science and neuroscience. Heproposes a view in which the mechanistic framework of classical physics andneuroscience is complemented by a more holistic approach. Pylkk�nen is particularlyknown for his work on mind-body-studies, building on David Bohm's interpretation ofquantum mechanics.

programme.title: Evolution of Ideas
programme.desc: Everything we can know about our lives and the universe is a subjective experience,either formed by one's own perceptions or the reports of others. programme.title: Caddisfly

programme.desc: Meet two river activists from Friends of the Fox River (FOTFR), Gary Swick and Jenni Kempf.

programme.title: Wild Hope

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: In southeast Florida, conservationists are out at dawn every morning, surveying and protecting the nests of three turtle species to keep them safe from human traffic.

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Return of the Manatees
programme.desc: Crystal River has long been a safe haven for the Florida manatee, but when an invasive algae wiped out the eelgrass that manatees need for food, the community rallied to restore the river and save the animals that call it home.

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: Coral reefs around the world are threatened by rising ocean temperatures, but hope is growing off the coast of Hawaii. There, researchers at the Coral Resilience Lab selectively breed corals to withstand ever-increasing amounts of heat stress.

programme.title: Cornwall's Climate Stories
programme.desc: Highlighting the impacts of climate change already being felt around the county of Cornwall - and meeting the inspiring people, communities and researchers working to tackle it.

programme.title: Cornwall's Climate Stories
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Living on the Edge
programme.desc: A passionate ultra-runner travels around the Cornish coast path, witnessing the ever-increasing impacts of coastal erosion.

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: All around the world, seabirds provide a critical link between land and sea. On Hawai’i, ecologists are working to protect two vital shearwater species that helped life first take hold across these islands.

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: On Panama’s remote Pearl Islands, marine biologist Callie Veelenturf is using her research on endangered sea turtles to help the country enshrine the rights of nature into law—and help the communities living there protect their own environment and livelihood.

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: A decade after a momentous dam removal, salmon are helping revive a lost U.S. ecosystem.

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: Farmers grow coffee to save a rainforest that’s crucial to local communities and wildlife.

programme.title: Cornwall's Climate Stories
programme.desc: This episode delves deep into issues around climate change and Cornwall’s fresh water – looking at everything from heavier rain leading to more sewage overflows, flooding and loss of topsoil, to how warmer river water is affecting fish, and the surprising carbon footprint of the water we use every day.

programme.title: Cornwall's Climate Stories
programme.desc: We’ve all heard headlines heralding the meat and dairy industry as the villains of the climate crisis, but is this really true?

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: Australian scientists enlist conservation dogs to save threatened native species.

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: In the middle of Rio de Janeiro sits the world’s largest urban rainforest: Tijuca National park. To combat a century of deforestation and hunting, a team of researchers are repairing the forest’s forgotten web of life, one species at a time.

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: In Brazil’s Atlantic Forest, Mauricio Ruiz has turned his love for nature into action by working with the community to reforest a critical stretch of the nation’s most endangered forest, and by using drones to help him reach his goal of planting 15 million trees.

programme.title: Wild Hope
programme.desc: Fernanda Abra leads a crucial conservation initiative along the roadways of Brazil, where vehicles annually kill about 475 million vertebrates - more than double the country’s human population.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: Two Accused of Murder (Jennifer Charron Case) - On Sunday, April 29, 2007, the body of Jennifer Charron, 21-years old, was found burnt to a crisp in a forest near Royan. The young waitress, who had been missing for two days, was visibly beaten and tied up. In this astonishing case, the clues examined by the experts will give them two leads: two men, two suspects with very different profiles... but investigators are convinced that they both have a direct link with the murder.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: THE CASE OF STÉPHANE KAMEUGNE - On December 24, 2008, the body of Stéphane Kameugne was fished out from a canal in Châlons-en-Champagne. The young man had been missing for two weeks and no one had seen him since the evening of his graduation ceremony from his engineering school. A theory soon emerged: the very drunk student had fallen over thea bridge over the canal which led to his death. But his parents and relatives did not believe this.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: The Savage Murder of a Mother and her Daughter (Amato Case)- On March 31, 2003, firefighters were called to a fire in a housing estate of Meyrargues, near Aix-en-Provence. On site, they discovered a horrific scene: the tortured and charred bodies of a mother and her daughter, Chantal and Audrey D'Amato, aged 53 and 24 respectively.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: A Night of Horror at Devil's Plateau (Marie-Jeanne Meyer Case) - On June 18, 2011, Marie-Jeanne Meyer, 17-years old, waved goodbye to her little sister before leaving for her daily jog on the heights of Tournon in Ardèche. She never came back. Three days later, her mutilated body was found in a freshly dug pit, near an area known to be cursed, "The Devil's Plateau." What's more, the crime scene looked like a mystical ritual ... Was it a ritual murder? Revenge? An unfortunate encounter? ...

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: A Mysterious Murder at the Farm (Valérie Bary Case)- On Friday, March 26, 2004, in the region of Dijon, Laurent Bary came home from his work to discover the lifeless body of his wife, Valerie, bathing in a pool of blood. According to the investigators' initial findings, the 38-year-old nurse's aid had been stabbed several times, seeming to validate the theory of a robbery gone wrong.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: On July 13, 2011, two boaters retrieved a suitcase that was floating in the bay of Lorient. Inside, they discovered the tied up corpse of a man.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: Bloody Christmas next to the Leman lake (CASE OF RUTH LÉGERET) - On January 4, 2006, Ruth Légeret was found dead in the middle of a pool of blood at her luxurious property in Vevey, Switzerland. Next to her was the lifeless body of her friend, Marina Studer. Who could have killed these two simple and wealthy widows? Clue after clue, the Swiss police's investigation would revolve around an environment of family jealousy and financial greed.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: September 16 2005. The lifeless body of Audrey Jouannet, 24, is found hidden under the bed in her small apartment in Soisy-sur-Seine. It soon becomes apparent that the young woman has been tortured at length before being strangled. But surprisingly, though the highly meticulous murderer has taken care to leave no sign of his passage, the autopsy reveals traces of sperm on the victim. It will take all of the investigators' intuition to pierce the mystery of this heinous crime...

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: Sylvain Dromard finds the body of his wife Laurence lying in a pool of blood in the kitchen. The crime was particularly violent and the theory of a burglary that went wrong is soon excluded. But investigators don't understand who could want the adorable hairdresser of Saint-Martin-d'Ablois dead. During the investigation, the work of profilers will enable them to draw a very precise portrait of the murderer...

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: After an ordinary dinner, Pierre and Gabrielle Labrell suffer severe abdominal pains.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: Nelly Crémel, 39, leaves her home to go jogging... never to return. Eight days later, after a vast search campaign, her body is found. There's no doubt that it's murder. The case soon ignites public opinion, even inflaming passions at the highest level of the state. The clues lead investigators on a number of trails, from the shadows of the French secret service to a manhunt for a possible sex maniac, in a case of murder most foul.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: Willy Pomonti, a retired architect, is found savagely murdered in his opulent villa in La Celle-Saint-Cloud, near Paris. It soon becomes clear that the man has been tortured prior to death. At several points during this extraordinary enquiry, police will feel they're holding the culprit... It will take them ten years to finally shed light on this particularly violent crime.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: The lifeless body of Christophe Lejard is found by his son just metres from their home. The man was shot in the head as he was getting into his car to go to work. A veritable execution, which at first glance doesn't square with the profile of the quiet family man. Yet behind the appearances, the investigation gradually reveals all the hate and resentment that revolved around the victim.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: A man walks into a gendarmerie near Saint-Malo to report that his wife has been missing since the previous day. The couple are going through a divorce, but this mother would never have left her seven children alone! An extensive search is undertaken but the woman cannot be found. What has happened to Adeline Piet? The investigation spans several years and experiences many twists.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: The corpse of Priscillia Ciatti, 14, is discovered by the side of a field, a few hundred metres from her family home. The teenager has been stabbed sixty times with a knife and -an extra sordid detail - a devil mask is found next to her body. Was Priscillia the victim of a prowler? A serial killer? A maniac inspired by a horror movie? Investigators soon find that the young girl felt she was being watched, and even threatened...

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: In the early hours of the morning, Mathilde Croguennec, 18, attending "Teknival" in Brittany, is found at the foot of a tree with her throat cut. Investigators face the task of finding the killer from among the 43,000 participants of this huge open-air festival of electronic music, where drink and drugs are consumed in abundance. An unusual investigation that leads the police down a number of false avenues.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: Arriving at her work, the secretary of a small firm in the suburbs of Geneva finds the body of Jean-Raymond Blatti, the company's new accountant. The man is lying in a pool of blood and, on his belly, the murderer has written "DIRTY RAPIST". Yet Jean-Raymond Blatti was never charged with sexual assault. Over the course of the investigation, this inscription will appear as one of the many mysteries of this case which is particularly rich in twists and turns.

programme.title: Crime Scene Solvers
programme.desc: On July 19th 2004, the naked and tied up body of a woman is recovered in the Ourcq canal in Fresnes-sur-Marne. The victim is impossible to identify.

programme.desc: When DNA proves that a man who practically admits to a brutal attack is innocent, police wonder why he is willing to take the blame.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1997, Kelly Eckart's car was found, with her belongings still in it, after she worked a late shift in Franklin, Indiana. Days later, her body was found in an isolated ravine.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Rachael Mullenix, 19, was convicted of stabbing her mother and then packing her bloodied corpse in a box.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A college senior was found raped and murdered near an unpaved footpath used by students to walk from one side of campus to the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder trail turned cold, until police got a call from a woman whose husband, Gerald Powers, had a criminal past and a fondness for Chevy Berettas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1987, the death of Crystal Purcell was considered an accident. Then in 2001, Barbara Purcell called police to suggest that her estranged husband had killed Crystal.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When court clerk Peter Porco doesn't report to his work in November 2004, a courts officer is ordered to the Porcos' family home in Bethlehem, NY.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The victim had been sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on the beach. A pair of men's tennis shoes was discovered near her body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A killer made great effort to obscure the shoe impressions left when he tracked blood on the floor, but he ended up creating new incriminating evidence...

programme.title: Forensic Files - Season 14

programme.title: Forensic Files - Season 14
programme.desc: A body is found stuffed into a suitcase forcing the police to search though the landfill for another missing victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The wife of a respected police officer was murdered in her own home. The crime went unsolved for more than a decade, until a newly formed cold case unit took a fresh look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A fireman died from what appeared to be heart disease, but his family was skeptical of the cause of death.

programme.title: Forensic Files - Season 14

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2001, Ginger Hayes and her infant son Nicholas were abducted during a carjacking and the crime had been reported by a witness within minutes of occurrence.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student is reported missing, police believe their investigation will be like countless others.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled a death an accident, but the detectives thought the evidence indicated otherwise.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "NEVER GIVE UP"
programme.desc: Mike Johnson and his son keep looking towards tomorrow for that big haul and Tim Adams and his crew face their own unique challenges out on the water.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "IDENTITY CRISIS"
programme.desc: It's the first week of April in the upper midwest. Our fisherman are looking for record setting hauls while market is still high.

programme.title: Fight to Survive S3 - "Soul Of A Survivor"
programme.sub-title: S03 : E10 Soul Of A Survivor
programme.desc: Craig DeMartino examines the stories of other survivors he’s met across the season. Their survival stories are all different, but Craig discovers that these survivors share more in common than you might think.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass S1 - "Blue Dot on the Map"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 Blue Dot on the Map
programme.desc: Host Ott DeFoe hunts down double-digit Largemouth Bass in a lake locked off in time in northern Florida.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass S1 - "Shallow Grass Lake Florida Bass"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Shallow Grass Lake Florida Bass
programme.desc: Host Ott DeFoe hunts down double-digit Largemouth Bass in the shallow grass lakes of these southwest Florida watershed areas.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass S1 - "Monster Bass in the Dead of Winter"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Monster Bass in the Dead of Winter
programme.desc: Host Ott DeFoe fights icy conditions and frozen rods as he hunts down double-digit Largemouth Bass in early January on Lake Chickamuga, Tennessee.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "South Minerva Reef"
programme.desc: The team embark on their biggest mission to date, an expedition to the remote and revered Minerva Reefs, where they encounter the most incredible diving conditions they've ever experienced, but also, a thriving population of voracious sharks!

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "North Minerva Reef"
programme.desc: After punching their way to North Minerva, the fellas continue their quest to land a big pelagic, but the local toothies threaten to throw a spanner into the team’s plans. Can they bag a tropical trophy, or will the sharks rain on their parade?

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "Yellowfin Mission"
programme.desc: Word's gotten out about some massive yellowfin baitballs, so the team head out in search of more tuna glory. Dwane, Kieran, Sam and Dave then bounce over the ditch for a few days diving the stunning waters of the Great Barrier Reef.

programme.title: Emergency S1 - "Ibiza"
programme.desc: Ibiza’s medical services face heavy strain during tourist season, often due to late-night excesses. In Thailand, nurses work tirelessly at the Full Moon Party to keep international revelers safe.

programme.title: Emergency S1 - "Carnival"
programme.desc: Rio’s Carnival—a week of samba and celebrations—often sends many to the ER. At Barcelona’s La Mercè Festival, first aid stations care for the injured, sick, and intoxicated.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S16 - "Big Horn Angler Fly Shop (Montana)"
programme.sub-title: S16 : E07 Big Horn Angler Fly Shop (Montana)
programme.desc: Mark Melnyk gets the opportunity to take a drift boat trip down the famed Big Horn River in Montana searching for trout on a fly.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S16 - "Fish Tales Fly Shop (Calgary Alberta)"
programme.sub-title: S16 : E08 Fish Tales Fly Shop (Calgary Alberta)
programme.desc: Jenna McKeown visits Calgary Alberta to fish the Bow River. This is one of the few rivers in the world that runs through a major city yet has excellent fishing.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S16 - "Snowshoe Camp Resort (Algoma)"
programme.desc: Mikey Metcalfe and Mark Melnyk are hunting for giant smallmouth bass, even a record, on a fly. They visit one of the best areas to do so in Ontario.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "WE ARE BOTTOM FEEDERS"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 WE ARE BOTTOM FEEDERS
programme.desc: Jedd is tough on his crew while fishing is tough out on the water. Mike and his brother try their luck in the icy waters of Wisconsin, and the fishing has been rough for Tim and his crew.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "NEVER GIVE UP"
programme.desc: Mike Johnson and his son keep looking towards tomorrow for that big haul and Tim Adams and his crew face their own unique challenges out on the water.

programme.title: South Seas Spearo S2 - "Yellowfin Mission"

programme.title: Emergency S1 - "Ibiza"
programme.desc: Ibiza’s medical services face heavy strain during tourist season, often due to late-night excesses. In Thailand, nurses work tirelessly at the Full Moon Party to keep international revelers safe.

programme.title: Emergency S1 - "Carnival"
programme.desc: Rio’s Carnival—a week of samba and celebrations—often sends many to the ER. At Barcelona’s La Mercè Festival, first aid stations care for the injured, sick, and intoxicated.

programme.title: Supercar Showdown S3 - "Semi Final Battle"
programme.desc: For the first time in this highly competitive showdown, the rookies will be behind the wheel of the awesome Ford Performance Racing V8 supercar, to battle it out for a spot in the grand final.

programme.title: Supercar Showdown S3 - "Supercar Showdown Champion"
programme.desc: After an epic semi final battle …only two rookies are left. It’s winner takes all. Who will hold up the coveted trophy and join the all-powerful FPR family?

programme.title: Geared Up S1 - "The Pagoda"
programme.desc: The team does a restoration modification of a 1964 Mercedes Benz 230 SL, adding custom made wheels and a modern engine.

programme.title: Geared Up S1 - "The Blazer"
programme.desc: A 1970 K5 Chevrolet Blazer undergoes a transformation with new paint, interior, and a diesel engine conversion.

programme.title: MTB Heroes S3 - "Brazil"
programme.desc: The World’s best Brazilian rider opens the doors to his house to show how it all started and brings us to Mexico for the most famous urban race in the world.

programme.title: MTB Heroes S3 - "Argentina"
programme.desc: Two talented Canadian brothers and pro MTB riders decide to go on a freeride trip together and choose to explore the remote desert of Argentina.

programme.title: The Ultimate Rider S1 - "Slow Speed"
programme.desc: To test the rookies’ fundamental skills of accelerating, braking, and cornering, Moto GP legend Daryl Beattie and Team Honda Racing boss Paul Free have designed both a skills session and a points challenge.

programme.title: The Ultimate Rider S1 - "21st Birthday"
programme.desc: Which contestant can get the furthest on 500ml of fuel while maintaining a set race speed? Can Glenn take out top spot and receive the best birthday present he could ask for?

programme.title: FMX Nomads S1 - "FMX Nomads"
programme.desc: Join Dan Whitby, Samson Eaton and Arran Powley for a day in the life of globetrotting freestyle motocross team, Bolddog.

programme.title: Endurance - 24 Hours at Spa S3 - "Through the Night"
programme.desc: The 24 Hours of Spa is a notoriously difficult race. For Andy Soucek, Albert Costa and Lewis Williamson, making it through night presents a tough challenge.

programme.title: Supercar Blondie: Living the Dream S1 - "Supercar Blondie: Living the Dream"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Supercar Blondie: Living the Dream
programme.desc: Alex Hirschi started her own vlog reviewing the world’s most exclusive and expensive supercars and her meteoric rise has seen her gain millions of followers and her very own TV Series.

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie S1 - "Los Angeles"
programme.desc: Supercar Blondie goes to Hollywood arriving in a million dollar V12 Ferrari. In the ‘City of Angels’ Alex is brought into contact with the Brotherhood of Racing, a community of drivers looking to create safe racing conditions for amateurs.

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie S1 - "Houston"
programme.desc: Given special access to a 2 million dollar exclusive McClaren Senna, Supercar Blondie digs under the surface to uncover gang feuds in the SLAB (Slow, Low and Bangin’) community and meets up with legendary hip hop artists Slim Thug and Paul Wall.

programme.title: Car Crews with Supercar Blondie S1 - "Las Vegas"
programme.desc: Supercar Blondie arrives in Las Vegas in a million dollar Lamborghini SVJ roadster. Taken under the wing of Patrick, founder of the Junkyard Pirates, Alex is brought into the rat rod world - home to American mavericks and outsiders.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S17 - "Is That a Freckle?"
programme.sub-title: S17 : E08 Is That a Freckle?
programme.desc: Fresh from the flight and still exhausted from the SEMA show in Las Vegas, Mark and the Ghoulz get back to the grind. Will eagerly prepares to paint his very first 1970 AAR ‘Cuda.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S17 - "The Thunder from Down Under"
programme.sub-title: S17 : E09 The Thunder from Down Under
programme.desc: When the local junkyard closes its doors, Mark and Dougie have to rescue an old friend from the earliest days of Graveyard Carz. But their journey appears to be cursed by a sudden increase in thunder and lightning.

programme.title: Graveyard Carz S17 - "This is a Crack Up!"
programme.sub-title: S17 : E10 This is a Crack Up!
programme.desc: The team takes on the biggest engine challenge of their lives! A numbers matching 383 for a 1971 ‘Cuda, that has multiple, massive, freeze cracks in the block. Mark puts a local shop to the test, as they attempt to save an engine.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas S2 - "1972 Corvette"
programme.desc: Vinnie and team at Muscle Cars of Texas are working on a frame restoration on the 1972 Corvette. From Ugly to beautiful. The 59 Ford pickup truck is ready to go home to the owner. The 1964 Corvette Fuelie gets a new bumper.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas S2 - "Galveston Corvette Show"
programme.desc: The 63 Z06 is getting more fiber glass work done on the inside. Vinnie is working on replacing the windows on the 442 and putting the guts in the door. Plus, we head to Galveston for the Galveston Corvette Show.

programme.title: Muscle Cars of Texas S2 - "1978 Trans Am"
programme.desc: The black 1978 Trans Am has a brand new motor and its ready to be fired up for the first time. The Malicious Intent, a 1969 Mustang is ready for the paint shop. The 1972 Corvette. Ugly to beautiful restoration is in the stripping process.

programme.title: King of the Hammers: The Ultra4 Saga S1 - "California Metal Stampede"
programme.desc: It's all or nothing as underdog Tom Liu drives himself to the brink in a heart-stopping Ultra 4 race.

programme.title: Endurance - 24 Hours at Spa S3 - "Through the Night"
programme.desc: The 24 Hours of Spa is a notoriously difficult race. For Andy Soucek, Albert Costa and Lewis Williamson, making it through night presents a tough challenge.

programme.desc: It's all or nothing as underdog Tom Liu drives himself to the brink in a heart-stopping Ultra 4 race.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Frozen Fire"
programme.desc: When a report of an illegal buck surfaces Warden Joe Kambic goes to work to find the shooters. Things heat up for Warden Rick Smauch when he responds to a fire, and Bryan Golie fights the winter weather just to patrol his area.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "River Rescue"
programme.desc: Drownings happen every Summer on Montana's rivers and lakes. Region 1 Warden Chris Crane steps in to save a kayaker while Region 2 Wardens catch friends fishing in the wrong spot.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S16 - "The Lodge At Palisades Creek (Idaho)"
programme.sub-title: S16 : E10 The Lodge At Palisades Creek (Idaho)
programme.desc: This region of Idaho has become famed for the trout fishing and variety of locations to do it. Mark Melnyk explores this area with one of the top guides.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S16 - "Scott Lake Lodge (Saskatchewan)"
programme.desc: Phil Rowley takes a floatplane to the far north of Saskatchewan to catch massive Northern Pike on a fly. He is the guest of Scott Lake Lodge.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots S1 - "Meet Island Air"
programme.desc: Veteran bush pilot Bob Stanford risks everything to save hunters struggling to stay alive in a remote area of Kodiak.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots S1 - "Fight or Flight"
programme.desc: While on a routine sightseeing flight, a massive storm has the pilots fighting to keep control of the craft and keep their passengers safe.

programme.title: Dropped S2 - "Horses Can Think... Rafts Can't"
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 Horses Can Think... Rafts Can't
programme.desc: Episode two begins where one left off, with Casey facing a decision. Positioned precariously on the mountain, they realize the ram they're chasing isn't legal, forcing them to retreat.

programme.title: Dropped S2 - "Band of Ten"
programme.desc: In episode three, the crew encounters a canyon with ten rams, sparking initial excitement. However, the subsequent desappointment sets in as none of the rams meet the legal criteria.

programme.title: Bottom Feeders S1 - "THE NEW GENERATION"
programme.desc: Everyone deals with harsh conditions as Mike and his son work a tough Lake Pepin, Jedd and his father can't seem to see eye to eye in Wisconsin and Tim heads out with a first timer only to come up pretty much empty handed.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass S1 - "Largemouth of Grassy Florida"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Largemouth of Grassy Florida
programme.desc: Host Ott DeFoe hunts down double-digit Largemouth Bass in these untouched grassy waters.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass S1 - "Monster Bass in Shallow Grass"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E06 Monster Bass in Shallow Grass
programme.desc: Host Ott DeFoe hunts down double-digit Largemouth Bass in this shallow lake full of grass.

programme.title: The Hunt for Monster Bass S1 - "Western Florida Monster Bass"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Western Florida Monster Bass
programme.desc: Host Ott DeFoe hunts down double-digit Largemouth Bass in this forgotten lake in western Florida.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue S1 - "Episode 1"
programme.desc: Anthony strives to prove himself as medical lead responding to a snowmobile crash on Togwotee Pass.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue S1 - "Episode 2"
programme.desc: The first priority of every mission is team safety, so when conditions on Pyramid Peak threaten Jake and Cody during a rescue, Tim demands they pump the breaks.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue S1 - "Episode 3"
programme.desc: Jake and Marilynn cancel a dinner party so they can respond to an injured skier on Teton Pass.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Death Valley"
programme.desc: Something is killing deer in the Missoula Valley and it has FWP working overtime to find the culprit.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Careless Endeavors"
programme.desc: Opening weekend mayhem has wardens running from one call to the next. But not all violations are negligence.

programme.title: Wardens S6 - "Grey Ghost"
programme.desc: Wardens get a tip about grey pickup shooting a deer at night; but even joining forces they have a tough time tracking down the Grey Ghost.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S16 - "Tuckamore Lodge (Newfoundland)"
programme.desc: Colin McKeown visits one of the prettiest parts of Newfoundland to salmon fish and also view whales, caribou and other wildlife.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S16 - "Wind River Fly Fishing (Wyoming)"
programme.sub-title: S16 : E13 Wind River Fly Fishing (Wyoming)
programme.desc: Mark Melnyk cast for cutthroat and other trout in some the most beautiful spots in Wyoming.

programme.title: The New Fly Fisher S16 - "Igloo Lake Lodge (Labrador)"
programme.desc: Info not available

programme.title: The Urban Huntsman S1 - "Danish Dynamite & The Boar"
programme.sub-title: S01 : E12 Danish Dynamite & The Boar
programme.desc: Mette is a personal trainer in one of Copenhagen's best gyms. She is also a hunter. Challenge the stereotypical "old white men" hunter image, and the paradox of the young female urbanite.

programme.title: The Urban Huntsman S1 - "The Italian Hare"
programme.desc: Travel back to the Apennine Mountains in Italy and join a hare hunt all the way up and above the clouds.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots S1 - "Deadman's Survival"
programme.desc: Island Air battles time and elements, to rescue a group trapped in Deadman's Bay.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots S1 - "Desperate Times"
programme.desc: Island Air drops off a group of desperate hunters in the heart of the bush as a deep freeze hits Kodiak.

programme.title: Alaska's Ultimate Bush Pilots S1 - "Risky Business"
programme.desc: Pilot Peter Rosendahl combats gale force wind and choppy seas while taxing a group of hunters to a floating lodge.

programme.title: Dropped S2 - "Now or Never"
programme.desc: As the fog passes on the peak of Fish Hook's rocky face, the outline of the crew appears exactly where the ram was bedded last. Did they shoot and Chris not hear the shot?

programme.title: Dropped S2 - "Saddles Sores"
programme.desc: Leaving sheep country on a high, the men face a daunting 22-hour trail ride to Tom-Tom, the first moose camp. Two days of riding loom a head before reaching their destination. However, trouble strikes just eight hours into the journey.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehistö tekee lopulta suuren löydön, mutta talven saapuessa Claudia on huolissaan siitä, että suuri löytö on ehkä tullut liian myöhään.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia haluaa epätoivoisesti aloittaa kaivostoiminnan, mutta raa'at tieolosuhteet saavat hänet epäilemään, pääseekö miehistö edes alueelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Guy ja Gary kilpailevat korjatakseen huonokuntoista tietä, ja Claudia toivoo, että uusi miehistön jäsen olisi se onnenpotti, jota hän kipeästi tarvitsee.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Robinin yllättävä ostosreissu stressaa Claudiaa, kun hänen virheostoksensa viivästyttävät kaivoskauden avausta.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia yrittää pitää rauhan yllä, kun Robin ja hänen isänsä ottavat yhteen, kun taas miehistö kamppailee korjatakseen yhden ongelman toisensa jälkeen kaivosautossaan.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Gary ja Josh turhautuvat koneiden jatkuviin vikoihin, ja Claudia tekee järkyttävän ilmoituksen, joka suistaa Robinin suunnitelmat raiteiltaan ja aiheuttaa ristiriitoja pariskunnan välille.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Jännitteet Robinin, Joshin ja Steven välillä nousevat pintaan, kun he riitelevät kaivamisen tavasta, ja kun Claudia astuu kuvioihin, asiat muuttuvat suorastaan räjähdysalttiiksi.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Autovikojen vaivaamat Robin ja hänen miehistönsä yrittävät saada polttoaineahakumatkan tehtyä ennen kuin polttoaine loppuu kesken.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Robin riitelee Claudian ja Joshin kanssa kaivokselta tulevan jaden laadusta, ja Larryn yritys siirtää kasarmi leiriin menee pieleen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Huonot jarrut, hermot kireällä ja epätasainen tie saavat Claudian epäilemään, pystyykö hänen miehistönsä raahaamaan valtavan kasarminsa leiriin ehjänä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia ja miehistö jatkavat määrätietoisesti kaivostoimintaa huolimatta maastopaloista heidän alueellaan, kunnes tilanne muuttuu huonompaan suuntaan ja heidän on pakko yrittää päästä pois.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Menetettyään kaksi viikkoa kaivostoimintaa maastopalojen takia Claudia ja Robin ottavat riskin ja palaavat 2 Mileen ja avaavat uuden kaivoksen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia stressaantuu yrittäessään saada parhaan jaden valmiiksi ostajia varten, ja hänen miehistönsä moraali joutuu koetukselle, kun he taistelevat kylmää vastaan aloittaakseen vihdoin 90 tonnin painavan lohkareen leikkaamisen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia patistaa miehistöään jatkamaan kaivostyötä pakkasesta ja huononevista tieolosuhteista huolimatta.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudian kausi alkaa kertalaakista, kun hän saa 250 000 dollarin jadetilauksen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Saatuaan vuosikausia huonoja tuloksia Scrappy Larryn kanssa Robin tekee pilan vanhalle kaverilleen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Robin ja Josh ottavat yhteen ostajan tiukan aikataulun vuoksi, kun heillä on loputtomasti ongelmia vaijerisahan asentamisessa.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kun suuri häiriö uhkaa sulkea kaivoksen, Claudia ja Robin ottavat riskin saadakseen kipeästi kaivattua polttoainetta leiriin.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Josh välttyy täpärästi katastrofilta ajaessaan kaivokselle polttoainelastin kanssa, ja Claudia on järkyttynyt, kun jadelaatta halkeaa kahtia, kun sitä työstetään.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia ja Robin yrittävät löytää toisen jadekiven ennen kuin ostaja perääntyy kaupasta, mutta aika ja vaihtoehdot alkavat käydä vähiin.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia kääntyy isänsä Steven puoleen saadakseen apua, koska hän pelkää, että hänen kaivosuransa suurin diili on karkaamassa käsistä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudian, Robinin ja Joshin välillä kiehuu, kun he yrittävät viimeistä kertaa saada kauppaa aikaan vietnamilaisen ostajan kanssa.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Massiivisen jadelaatan siirtäminen koettelee kaivoksen vanhoja laitteita ja Joshin kärsivällisyyttä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: 20 tonnia painavan lohkareen kuljettaminen kaivoksesta lähtevällä petollisella tiellä osoittautuu liian raskaaksi heidän vanhalle kuorma-autolleen Six packille.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: 20 tonnia painavan lohkareen kuljettaminen kaivokselta lähtevällä petollisella tiellä osoittautuu liian raskaaksi heidän vanhalle kuorma-autolleen Six packille.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Elokuun hurjan lumimyrskyn takia Claudian ja Robinin on pakko jäädä 2 Mileen, kun taas Gary ja Garon yrittävät pelastaa tilanteen ajamalla myrskyn läpi ja tuomalla heille tarvikkeita.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Robin tekee vaikean päätöksen rakkaan kaivosautonsa Six packin suhteen toisen kalliiksi tulleen rikkoutumisen jälkeen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Talven lähestyessä Claudia ajaa uupuneen miehistönsä murtumispisteeseen, mikä saa kiihkon leimahtamaan ja pakottaa Claudian viimein hyväksymään tappionsa.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Uusi kaivoskausi on täynnä ikäviä yllätyksiä, mutta epätodennäköinen tapahtuma pelastaa tilanteen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Josh on kyllästynyt työskentelemään isälleen, joten hän perustaa oman kuorma-autoyrityksensä uudella rekalla.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Armeijan kuorma-auto hajoaa julmalla tiellä kaivokselle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Gary ja poikansa pelastavat vanhan armeijan kuorma-auton, mutta sen ajaminen kaivokselle on raakaa.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Garon ja Josh menettävät Six packin hallinnan mutaisilla teillä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Justin lentää paikalle uuden vaijerisahan kanssa, mutta menettää malttinsa yrittäessään asentaa sitä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehistö kohtaa loputtomasti ongelmia yrittäessään leikata palan 18 metrin pituisesta linssistä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia tuo paikalle ison porauskaluston, ja hänellä on vain neljä päivää aikaa löytää paras jadepaikka, mutta hän ja Robin eivät osaa päättää, mistä etsiä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehet ottavat yhteen, kun he loppukauden kiireet pakottavat heidät työskentelemään kahdessa kaivoksessa yhtä aikaa.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehistö irrottaa jadelohkareita J-linssistä, mutta iso ongelma tiellä uhkaa kaikkea.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kun Claudia ja Robini etsivät jadea poraamalla tuloksetta, edes yhtiön geologit eivät pääse yksimielisyyteen suunnitelmasta.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudia, Robin ja miehistö yrittävät saada raskaan kaluston vuorelle ennen kuin tulvivat joet katkaisevat pääsyn kaivosalueelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Ilmassa on jännitettä, kun miehistö yrittää saada raskasta kalustoa mutaiselle, lohkareiden peittämälle 120 kilometrin pituiselle polulle perustaakseen uuden jadekaivoksen vuorenhuipulle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehistö yrittää saada koneensa kulkemaan vyöryvien jokien yli perustaakseen uuden jadekaivoksensa vuorenhuipulle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Alan on vakuuttunut siitä, että Dynastyn alueella veden täyttämän kuopan alla on jadea.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Robin yrittää uhmata fysiikan lakeja saadakseen massiivisen uuden kasarmin Wolverinen alueelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Jade Cityn porukkaa koettelee huono onni, ja jokainen keksii ainutlaatuisia ratkaisuja huonon onnen karkottamiseksi.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kaikki innostuvat, kun he vihdoin alkavat kaivaa esiin lupaavia vihreitä lohkareita, joiden miehistö uskoo olevan miljoonien arvoisia.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Jännitteet nousevat pintaan, kun ulkomaiset sijoittajat piipahtavat yllättäen tarkistamaan Wolverinen kaivosalueen töitä, ja Alan yrittää rauhoittaa tilannetta.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kun Wolverinen kaivoksella vihdoin löydetään lupaavia lohkareita, miehistö huomaa, että he ovat saattaneet mennä tonttinsa rajojen ulkopuolelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Jännitys kasvaa, kun kaivoskauden loppu lähestyy, ja Jade Cityn miehistö haluaa löytää kallisarvoisen lohkareen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Jade Cityn kaivostyöläiset yrittävät löytää rikkauksia - tarpeeksi suuren jadelohkareen, joka tekee vaikutuksen sijoittajiin - ennen kauden päättymistä.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudian ja Robinin testaamattomat koneet alkavat hajota raa'alla matkalla Wolverinen kaivosalueelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Miehistö yrittää ylittää tulvivia jokia matkalla kaivokselle koneet mukanaan, mutta Josh jää jälkeen ongelmallisen kaivinkoneen takia.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Josh jää jumiin pitkällä matkalla Wolverinen kaivokselle, kun pultit irtoavat kaivinkoneesta eikä hän voi kutsua apua.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kaivoskausi alkaa, ja vaikka jadea ei näy, rekkaonnettomuus tuo Jade Citylle onnea.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Guysta tulee Wolverinen johtaja, ja uuden työntekijän palkkaaminen uhkaa suistaa hänen tehtävänsä löytää kauden ensimmäinen jadelohkare.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Juuri kun Wolverinen miehistö tehostaa turvallisuusmenetelmiään, uusi työntekijä Jay romahtaa, mikä paljastaa heidän hätävalmiutensa säröt.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Josh käyttää uutta kaivinkonetta, kun taas arvottomien kivien kasa saa Claudian harkitsemaan uutta strategiaa.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Alan tuo Jade Cityyn ostajaryhmän, mikä saa Claudian tiimin paniikkiin ja etsimään kauden ensimmäiset myytävät jadelohkareet.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kun miehistö rämpii mudassa etsiessään miljoonan dollarin arvoista lohkaretta, Josh riskeeraa puolen miljoonan dollarin arvoisen kaluston yrittäessään vetää rekkaansa pois vajoamasta.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Tiimi löytää kauden parhaan jadelohkareen, mutta on vaarassa heikentää sen arvoa, kun he yrittävät leikata kaikki halkeamat pois.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudian poika Justin osoittaa, että hän osaa löytää jadea, kun taas Scrappy Larry, Robin ja Josh kamppailevat hinaamaan rikkinäisen autonsa Wolverinelle.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Huonot tulokset pakottavat Robinin ja Justinin viimeiseen yritykseen etsiä jadekiviä pelastaakseen kauden, kun taas Scrappy Larry kiirehtii muuntamaan dieselillä toimivan säiliön.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Claudian hanke majoittaa työryhmä Jade Cityyn vaarantuu, kun saostussäiliö vuotaa juomaveteen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kylmän sään saapuessa aikaisin ja velkojen kasaantuessa miehistö työntää, vetää ja raahaa mammuttimaisen ja mahdollisesti kauden pelastavan lohkareen leirille.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI
programme.desc: Kun vuoden lupaavinta lohkaretta työstetään Wolverinella, Josh ja R2 kolaroivat rekka-autonsa, ja Claudia tiimineen jäävät ymmälleen.

programme.title: Jade Fever | FI

programme.desc: We'd rather jack than Fleetwood Mac! A whole day of 80s celebrities & singalongs, Including Rick Astley, Jason Donovan, Brother Beyond & Bucks Fizz.

programme.title: Rustie Lee's Eat To The Beat!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Rustie Lee's Eat To The Beat!
programme.desc: Food glorious food! The 70s & 80s were full of edible bands & songs, and TV chef Rustie Lee has raided the fridge & pantry to serve up pop's sweet treats. It's going to be a riot!

programme.title: We Love Cheesy Pop Day!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 We Love Cheesy Pop Day!
programme.desc: We'd rather jack than Fleetwood Mac! A whole day of 80s celebrities & singalongs, Including Rick Astley, Jason Donovan, Brother Beyond & Bucks Fizz.

programme.title: Cartoon Capers! 80s Animated Vids
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Cartoon Capers! 80s Animated Vids
programme.desc: If you thought video effects started with digital in the 90s - just look at these! Pushing the boundaries to make amazing animations - and some puppets!

programme.title: Every Number 2 of the 80s!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Every Number 2 of the 80s!
programme.desc: Can you believe none of these 145 songs reached number 1? Mark Goodier with 12 hours of classics - in order - that didn't quite have what it takes, but still sound fantastic!

programme.title: It's 1983 Night!
programme.desc: Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights & iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made 1983!

programme.title: The NOW Yearbook 1983
programme.desc: With British artists achieving unprecedented success across the world, Bruno Brookes has a stellar selection of songs charting the 1st year of "NOW That's What I Call Music" - 1983

programme.title: Who Won Wot in 1983?
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Who Won Wot in 1983?
programme.desc: Mark Goodier with 1983's big music award winners. Which top award did Black Lace win, and who was NME's 'Best Dressed Female'? Stay tuned to find out!

programme.title: The 1983 POWER Hour!
programme.desc: 60 minutes of power pop & rock! Earplugs at the ready as we rewind to 1983 with U2, Simple Minds, David Bowie & Bonnie Tyler!

programme.title: Every Number 2 of the 80s!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Every Number 2 of the 80s!
programme.desc: Can you believe none of these 145 songs reached number 1? Mark Goodier with 12 hours of classics - in order - that didn't quite have what it takes, but still sound fantastic!

programme.title: Carol Decker's 30 Rock Dudes!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Carol Decker's 30 Rock Dudes!
programme.desc: T'Pau's Carol Decker is back again with a countdown of 80s guys who liked to rock! With John Parr, Billy Idol, Guns n Roses & ZZ Top.

programme.title: All Day - 80s Power Ballads!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 All Day - 80s Power Ballads!
programme.desc: From the decade that invented the genre - non-stop powerful love songs, back to back.

programme.title: 101 Power Ballads: 1980-1989
programme.desc: From The Korgis in 1980 to U2 in 1989 - 101 Power Ballads in order. Prepare to weep!

programme.title: Heavy Pumping
programme.desc: Ditch the pre-workout and let the riffs do the heavy lifting. This high-octane blast of speed and power is designed to fuel your gains or ignite a living room mosh pit. High BPMs, crushing drums, and zero excuses.

programme.title: Night Time Metal
programme.desc: The sun is down, the filters are off, and the real chaos begins. Brace yourself for the raw, uncensored side of the scene too heavy for daylight. This is the unfiltered truth of the underground. Adult ears only.

programme.title: Finnish Metal Special
programme.desc: From the frozen North comes a sound of haunting melodies and raw intensity. Dive into Finland’s finest, where melancholic atmospheres meet the power of the thousand lakes. It’s a masterclass in darkness and ice-cold riffs.

programme.title: The Home of Heavy
programme.desc: Step into the headquarters for everything that shakes the earth. From the pillars of the classics to the pioneers of the new era, this is where the heart of metal beats loudest. This is where you belong.
