programme.desc: The TV show Earth in Sports will immerse you into the point of view of different athlete who are practicing extreme or peaceful sports at the best spot all around the world. You will discover the most beautiful landscapes and some of them are nearly impossible to reach.

programme.title: Earth in Sports - Season 5 - Episode 10
programme.desc: The TV show Earth in Sports will immerse you into the point of view of different athlete who are practicing extreme or peaceful sports at the best spot all around the world. You will discover the most beautiful landscapes and some of them are nearly impossible to reach.

programme.title: Escape
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 2 - Paul John Elliott
programme.desc: Without really knowing why, Paul Elliott will change his life from cartoonist to massage therapist. Aspired by success, money, success, he will create several clinics and will eventually lose the human aspects and lose himself. A new turn, a new meeting and Paul will finally resume his dreams of painting. Follow Paul in his tumults and his happiness found.

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 2 - Annabelle Higgins and Valérie Sirois
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Annabelle Higgins and Valérie Sirois
programme.desc: They are beautiful sisters, they are passionate about nature and they have a very strong common point: entrepreneurship. After years of evolution in consumer sectors, discover Annabelle and Valérie who knew how to listen to their passion to create a fitness and surf club (for Annabelle) and a zero waste grocery store (for Valérie).

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 2 - Véronick Desmarais
programme.desc: The everyday work is not always easy and it is sometimes difficult to get by. If there is one thing that Véronick has learned from her experience and those around her, it is because she is able to surpass that and to embark on her dreams and plans to become a massage therapist. You will believe in your abilities too.

programme.title: My Zen People - Season 2 - Violaine Courtois
programme.desc: Everything started from the dream of her parents, she becomes a veterinarian. In her career that she launched backwards, Violaine will meet people who will take her to a different path of life. The chance will be at the rendezvous but it is especially the courage to resume studies and create his company that will build his project. Follow the encounters and travels of Violaine that brought her to fasciatherapy and nonviolent communication.

programme.title: Earth from above - Season 3 - Nature’s Heroes: Gabon - Part 2
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Nature’s Heroes: Gabon - Part 2
programme.desc: The incredible diversity of flora and fauna, the fight against climate change, the balance between growth and sustainable development: these are all battles being fought on five continents. Yann Arthus-Bertrand takes us on this expedition. We're off to Gabon to discover the Ivindo National Park and Port-Gentil, then on to Sri Lanka in Kandi. Back to Gabon we go to Libreville, then Lambaréné to talk about turtles and the health of the local people. Finally, off to Dhaka-Bangladesh.

programme.title: Escape
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.title: Massages
programme.desc: Massage studio will show you the best massage techniques in places which will make you dream. Let us take care of you! Lay down, relax and forget all your problems.

programme.title: My Zen Relaxation
programme.desc: Turn down the lights, kick your shoes back, take a cup of tea... You're on MyZen TV, time to relax.

programme.title: Spiritual Sports
programme.desc: Nurture the body AND the mind with Spiritual Sports

programme.title: Pilates
programme.desc: Stay in shape with our pilates courses !

programme.title: Yoga
programme.desc: Practice Yoga from the comfort of your home with our experienced teatchers.

programme.title: Audio advices - Season 5 - Back relaxation
programme.desc: Is work stressing you out? Are you tired of the routine? Here's a series of relaxation exercises to help you unwind 100%.

programme.title: Audio advices - Season 5 - After sitting for a long time
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 After sitting for a long time
programme.desc: Is work stressing you out? Are you tired of the routine? Here's a series of relaxation exercises to help you unwind 100%.

programme.title: Audio advices - Season 5 - Lower body relaxation
programme.desc: This exercise aims to release all the tension you can feel in your legs and feet. You will first be invited to quickly relieve the upper body so you can then concentrate more easily on the rest. Then, with a series of muscle contractions and decontractions, you will deeply relax your legs and feet. You'll notice you'll feel much better overall.

programme.title: Audio advices - Season 1 - Get in contact with your needs
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Get in contact with your needs
programme.desc: Need to regenerate your body? Take the time to make some exercices to decompress and find a peaceful harmony.

programme.title: Escape
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.title: Earth from above - Season 3 - Nature’s Heroes: Gabon - Part 1
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Nature’s Heroes: Gabon - Part 1
programme.desc: How can we reconcile the development needed to sustain the lives of nearly seven billion people with the protection of the Earth's natural resources? Yann Arthus-Bertrand and his team have chosen Gabon to continue their survey of the planet. We'll be discovering the Kongou Falls, the Langoué clearing with their elephant in Gabon. Then in Colombia, we will go on the island of Malpelo with their shark. Back to Gabon we will discover the Minkébé National Park and the bats in Franceville. We will also go to India in Hyderabad, which has convinced farmers to use no pesticides and no GMOs in their cultivation.

programme.title: Julie's Frenchy Cookbook - Season 4 - Citrus flavors
programme.desc: Julie takes you through the Pyrénées Orientales, then Corsica, before making a stop on the Côte d'Azur, and concludes her journey between Rungis and Paris... all to explore the world of citrus fruits! These fruits add flavor, zest, and seasoning to any recipe, making them indispensable in the kitchen. They bring the warmth and sunshine of the South of France and the exoticism of distant lands. While we're all familiar with lemons, clementines, and grapefruits, Julie introduces us to a thousand other varieties.

programme.title: Escape
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.title: My Zen Trendy - Season 2 - Topanga Canyon, AMBA Yoga
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Topanga Canyon, AMBA Yoga
programme.desc: Val goes to the heart of Topanga Canyon, California, a favorite spot for yoga addicts and nature lovers. Here she will experience AMBA Yoga, a kind of hollistic yoga for women. We will also attend a Sound Bowl session, a Tibetan practice considered the ultimate in meditation. In the heart of Venice Beach, we will discover the "Plant Lab", a new high-tech application that records the vibrations of plants to create music. Finally, Val will present us the largest concept store of rare crystals in South America.

programme.title: My Zen Trendy - Season 2 - Hot Springs
programme.desc: Still in Palm Springs, we will discover the Parker Hotel, the most trendy and design hotel in town. A French chef will take us to cook in the middle of nature. Then, Val will go to Desert Springs, a town known for its natural hot springs. At one of the many spas in town, Val will test one of the springs and even attend a Sound Bowl session.

programme.title: My First Garden - Season 1 - Growing mushrooms at home
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 Growing mushrooms at home
programme.desc: We meet at the Romainville market garden centre to learn how to grow mushrooms at home. Some varieties, such as button mushrooms, oyster mushrooms or shiitake mushrooms, grow quite easily in mushroom houses. But you too can do it. And today we will show you how to make a miniature version of this kit to grow oyster mushrooms at home.

programme.title: Escape
programme.desc: Watch beautiful landscapes from all over the world !

programme.title: Sinj
programme.desc: Sinj blends courage, tradition, and warm hospitality—reflected even in its food. Edo Crljen welcomed us with a bold serving of tripes, while Ankica Vlastelica prepared the town’s pride: arambaši, Sinj’s iconic stuffed cabbage rolls you simply can’t leave without tasting.

programme.title: Med Nations 08 Egypt
programme.desc: Journey along the northern coast of Egypt, where the Mediterranean meets the land of the pharaohs. From the historic streets and libraries of Alexandria to charming coastal towns and bustling markets, Egypt reveals a unique blend of ancient heritage, vibrant culture, and seaside traditions that continue to shape life along its Mediterranean shores.

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Whats On Lights, Cinema, Mediterranean
programme.desc: The Mediterranean screens its stories this week. Malta hosts the Mediterranean Film Festival, while Italy Venice Film Festival and Med Film Festival bring glamour and regional storytelling to iconic locations. France Cannes Film Festival shines globally, Spain International Fantastic Film Festival of Catalonia celebrates genre cinema, and Morocco Amazigh Film Festival showcases North African voices. Turkey Adana Golden Boll Film Festival and Croatia Zagreb Film Festival round out a cinematic journey across the Med.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Gold Cuisine EP 19
programme.desc: Discover a mix of comforting and traditional flavors in this episode, starting with Pomilorotiania (scrambled eggs with tomato), a simple yet satisfying dish, and finishing with Mahallepi, a creamy and delicate milk pudding. A delightful pairing of savory simplicity and sweet indulgence.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Slovenia, a small nation of just two million people, is one of Europe’s most surprising delights. Nestled at the crossroads of the Germanic, Mediterranean, and Slavic worlds, it offers a charm all its own.

programme.title: Med Destinations Pula
programme.desc: Discover Pula, Croatia, with Med Destinations. Famous for its Roman amphitheater and charming old town, Pula combines historical grandeur with Adriatic seaside beauty.

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini
programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Property in the Med Gege Gatt Panel
programme.sub-title: Property in the Med Gege Gatt Panel
programme.desc: As artificial intelligence reshapes the property landscape, standing still is no longer an option. This panel explores how AI is transforming the Mediterranean real estate market—from predictive analytics and smarter valuations to automated design, marketing, and investment strategies that give early adopters a decisive edge. Beyond the tools, the discussion digs into what actually fuels AI: data, energy, infrastructure, and talent—and how these hidden drivers are redefining competition itself. By unpacking both the opportunities and the risks, this conversation reveals how forward-thinking developers, investors, and agencies can stay ahead in a market where technology is now as valuable as location.

programme.title: Med Minds 07 Dali
programme.desc: Salvador Dalí, the eccentric Mediterranean visionary, turned his life into art and became one of history’s most unforgettable minds.

programme.title: Med Nations 08 Egypt
programme.desc: Journey along the northern coast of Egypt, where the Mediterranean meets the land of the pharaohs. From the historic streets and libraries of Alexandria to charming coastal towns and bustling markets, Egypt reveals a unique blend of ancient heritage, vibrant culture, and seaside traditions that continue to shape life along its Mediterranean shores.

programme.title: Mediterraneo
programme.sub-title: S01:E01 La Vita in Pericolo fra Terra e Mare
programme.desc: In the heart of the Mediterranean lies a world where nature keeps some of its most breathtaking secrets. Carved between Africa, Asia, and Europe, this deep sea is home to extraordinary wildlife and waters so blue they draw visitors from across the globe. A sea that not only boasts natural beauty but also witnessed the dawn of the world’s earliest civilisations.

programme.title: Colours of Mediterranean Culture
programme.desc: From Malta to Greece, Mediterranean arts flourish. Valletta Baroque Festival, Malta International Arts Festival, and Birgu by Candlelight light up the island with music and heritage. Italy’s Cortona on the Move, La Fenice in Piazza San Marco, and Mercantia Festival showcase photography, opera, and street performance. France’s Art Paris and International Garden Festival, Spain’s Revela’t Festival and La Leyenda de Tartessos, Portugal’s Umbrella Sky Project and Walk & Talk Biennale, Turkey’s Istanbul Theatre Festival and Biennial, and Greece’s Athens & Epidaurus Festival highlight the Med’s rich artistic tapestry.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Rome
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Rome, Italy — a city of ancient ruins, grand monuments, and unforgettable food. She experiences daily Roman life, from enjoying cappuccino and cornetto at a local café to tasting classic pastas like cacio e pepe and pasta alla gricia. She visits local markets, enjoys a picnic at Villa Doria Pamphili, and discovers Rome’s iconic landmarks — the Spanish Steps, Trevi Fountain, and Pantheon — beautifully lit at night.

programme.title: MED Destination KEFALONIA
programme.desc: WITH VO

programme.title: Med Destinations Rimini
programme.desc: Med Destinations visits Rimini, Italy’s seaside gem, where golden beaches meet rich history. From Roman ruins to vibrant nightlife, Rimini offers the perfect mix of culture and coastal charm.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Gold Cuisine EP 20
programme.desc: Savor the flavors of Cyprus with Agiotiko stew, a rich and hearty traditional dish, paired with a delicate cream of anari wrapped in crispy filo pastry. A satisfying mix of savory comfort and sweet indulgence.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Kaštela (U masliniku)
programme.desc: In Kaštela, a cluster of seven towns near Split, winemaking runs deep. Among olive groves and vineyards, Mladen Kuzmanić treated us to local flavors—sipa i bob, pancetta, goat cheese, and homemade sausage—perfectly paired with a glass of regional wine.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Basque
programme.desc: Malini Angelica visits San Sebastián, Spain’s Basque Country, exploring its unique culture, history, and world-renowned cuisine. She goes on a pintxo crawl, visits La Concha beach, nearby towns like Getaria and Zarautz for local specialties, experiences a traditional txoko, and ends with Semana Grande fireworks.

programme.title: The Odyssey the Man Who Defied the Gods
programme.sub-title: The Odyssey the Man Who Defied the Gods
programme.desc: Devastated by the meaningless of the war on Troy, Odysseus is angry at the Gods for having stood by and let the carnage unfurl. All he wants to do is go home. But his journey will be an odyssey...

programme.title: Opera - Salome
programme.desc: The 87th Festival of the Maggio Musicale Fiorentino opens with Richard Strauss's Salome, conducted by Alexander Soddy. Directed by Emma Dante, this new production features Lidia Fridman as Salome, Anna Maria Chiuri as Herodias, and Nikolai Schukoff as Herodes. The performance blends Strauss's intense musical drama with a fresh and dynamic staging.

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Fabio Luisi e Alexander Gadjiev Torino 2022
programme.sub-title: Concerto - OSN Fabio Luisi e Alexander Gadjiev Torino 2022
programme.desc: On April 28, 2022, esteemed conductor Fabio Luisi and acclaimed pianist Alexander Gadjiev took the stage at the Auditorium Rai "Arturo Toscanini" in Turin, accompanied by the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai. Gadjiev delivered a masterful performance of Chopin’s Piano Concerto No. 2, while Luisi led a captivating interpretation of Strauss’ "Aus Italien".

programme.title: Hvar (Stari Grad)
programme.desc: The island of Hvar, Croatia’s sunniest spot, is perfect for enjoying a traditional Dalmatian marenda. In the charming town of Stari Grad, restaurateur Damir Čavić welcomed us with a spread of marinated anchovies, octopus salad, pašticada, cod, and vegetables—washed down with a light bevanda.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Florence
programme.desc: Malini Angelica explores Florence, the heart of Tuscany and birthplace of the Renaissance. She visits iconic landmarks like the Duomo, Uffizi Gallery, and Ponte Vecchio, uncovering the city’s artistic legacy. Along the way, she enjoys Tuscan classics like Bistecca alla Fiorentina and the delicious schiaccata panino.

programme.desc: As property markets evolve, the laws governing ownership and transfer must evolve with them. programme.title: Whats On Rhythms of the Mediterranean
programme.sub-title: Whats On Rhythms of the Mediterranean
programme.desc: The Mediterranean dances to its own beat. Malta Muzika Muzika showcases national talent, while Italy Nameless Festival delivers international rock and electronic energy. Spain Azkena Rock Festival rocks Vitoria Gasteiz with legendary performances, and Turkey Istanbul Caz Festival blends jazz and local musical traditions. Discover how Mediterranean rhythms echo across genres, generations, and cultures.

programme.title: Med Destinations Crete
programme.desc: Med Destinations takes you to Crete, the jewel of the Greek islands, where ancient history meets breathtaking landscapes. Explore charming villages, hidden beaches, and the vibrant local culture that makes Crete a must-visit Mediterranean paradise.

programme.title: Malini Angelica Casablanca
programme.desc: A lot of people say Casablanca isn’t worth visiting and that you should head straight to Marrakesh or Fez — but Malini Angelica completely disagrees! In this video, she explores Morocco’s most authentic city and discovers where Europe meets Africa in a fascinating blend of culture, history, and architecture. It’s not overrun with tourists, it’s 100% real, and it ended up being her favorite city in Morocco!

programme.title: Med Destinations Delos
programme.desc: Step into the myth and mystery of Delos with Med Destinations. This tiny island, rich in archaeological wonders and legendary tales, offers a unique glimpse into Greece’s ancient past amid stunning coastal vistas.

programme.title: Outdoor and Nature Ep 5
programme.desc: OUTDOOR & Nature, a weekly program that highlights sports, outdoor activities, and the breathtaking scenery of Cyprus, will introduce you to the great outdoors. Each episode highlights government initiatives, community organisations, and volunteer efforts to preserve Cyprus's natural heritage while examining nature, wildlife, and conservation. Take a trip of inspiration, exploration, and adventure with hosts Panicos Pilalis and Aristo Aristeidou. Listen and get motivated to go on your own outdoor adventure in Cyprus!

programme.title: Med Destinations Ios
programme.desc: Discover the lively spirit and scenic beauty of Ios on Med Destinations. From crystal-clear beaches to winding streets and sunset views, Ios combines vibrant island life with the tranquility of the Aegean Sea.

programme.title: Med Destinations Ancona
programme.desc: Explore Ancona, a bustling port city on the Adriatic, with Med Destinations. Discover its historic landmarks, scenic waterfronts, and the unique blend of maritime tradition and modern Italian life.

programme.title: Jesenice
programme.desc: In the hillside village of Staro Selo Jesenice, with views of the central Dalmatian islands, we found stone houses, a bocce court, and a traditional tavern run by Ante Bajso. There, he treated us to a Dalmatian classic—meat slow-cooked under a bell-shaped lid, peka.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Here along the Côte d’Azur, we wander the sunlit promenades of Nice, catch whispers of fortunes changing hands at Monaco’s famed casino, and step inside the elegant villas once home to artists and heiresses.

programme.title: MED Destination ANTIPAROS

programme.title: Malini Angelica Barcelona
programme.desc: Barcelona, Spain, is a city close to Malini's heart. Returning after her student years, she retraces old steps to see how the city has changed. Barcelona, one of Europe’s most visited cities, still holds centuries-old charm. Malina's old haunts include El Gòtic, Sant Antoni, Passeig de Gràcia, and Barceloneta. visits Gaudí’s iconic Casa La Pedrera, and discovers the new wave of creative tapas restaurants in El Raval, a once run-down quarter now bursting with energy.

programme.title: Rick Steves Europe
programme.desc: Join Rick as he roams the lively streets of Barcelona, savoring its artistic treasures and flavorful tapas, before venturing to nearby landmarks in the proudly distinct region of Catalunya.

programme.title: The Odyssey Cyclops Curse
programme.desc: Odysseus and his companions are trapped in the Cyclops’ cave. But he is a man with a plan. He carves out a stake and, after having drunk Polyphemus under the table, drives it into his one eye. But outwitting the monster is just one of many challenges that awaits him and his men.

programme.title: Brač (Supetar)

programme.title: Malini Angelica Amalfi
programme.desc: Malini Angelica travels to Italy’s stunning Amalfi Coast, exploring its dramatic cliffs, colorful seaside towns, and crystal-clear waters. From the charm of Positano and Amalfi to the tranquility of Ravello, she experiences the region’s beauty, cuisine, and coastal lifestyle. Malini captures the magic that makes the Amalfi Coast one of Italy’s most breathtaking destinations.

programme.title: Io Ti Cerchero
programme.desc: Valerio Frediani confronts the complexities of fatherhood amidst his quest for truth. As he delves deeper into his son Ettore's death, Valerio uncovers unexpected connections that challenge his perceptions. The episode intensifies the investigation, revealing new layers of intrigue and personal stakes.

programme.title: Med Nations 02 Greece
programme.desc: Greece has a culture that has been shaped by hundreds of years of ideas, traditions, and life on the sea. From the ancient wonders of Athens to the sun-drenched islands of the Aegean, Greece shows this. This trip shows how Greece still inspires the Mediterranean and the world through its food, music, and long history.

programme.title: Tabù
programme.desc: Olivia cultivates her relationship with Cesare while Eros seems to have sincerely become fond of Martina. Emma, far from everyone, continues to date Mrs. Nice and Viola discovers a secret of her mother. But the life of the Mazzuccatos is shaken by a drastic change.

programme.title: The Odyssey Circe the Witch Goddess
programme.sub-title: The Odyssey Circe the Witch Goddess
programme.desc: In Ithaca, Queen Penelope has been putting up with the advances of suitors who covet her hand, and her husband's throne. As she thinks of ways to put them off, Odysseus is still on his long journey back home, and must now face off against the witch Circe.

programme.title: Concerto - OSN Marc Albrecht E Simone Lamsma Torino
programme.sub-title: Concerto - OSN Marc Albrecht E Simone Lamsma Torino
programme.desc: In this 2022 concert in Turin, Marc Albrecht conducts the Orchestra Sinfonica Nazionale della Rai, with Simone Lamsma as the violin soloist. The programme includes Shostakovich's Violin Concerto No. 1, showcasing Lamsma's technical brilliance and emotional depth, and Franck's Symphony in D minor, celebrated for its rich harmonies and cyclical structure. The performance highlights a powerful blend of passion and precision.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021

programme.title: World Downhill Skateboarding Championships Round 1 - Axamer Lizum (AUT)
programme.desc: The Downhill Skateboarding World Championships in Axamer Lizum, Austria, kicked off the 2025 season from June 13 to 15. The course on the steep and technically demanding 3.3 km Hoadlstraße featured tight hairpin turns, long straights, and gradients of up to 21.8%, providing ideal conditions for high-speed racing and overtaking maneuvers.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2021

programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Womens Climbing Part 2 - Female Climbing Heroes - Outdoor Bouldering

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018

programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Womens Climbing Part 1 - Female Climbing Heroes - Indoor Bouldering
programme.desc: Year after year, new climbing gyms are built on all continents. The discipline of bouldering, which is unroped climbing above padded mats, primarily enjoys an increase in popularity, most notably among girls and young women.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Womens Climbing Part 2 - Female Climbing Heroes - Outdoor Bouldering
programme.desc: The Forêt de Fontainebleau in France is the largest and most developed bouldering area in the world and home to one of France's most famous climbers - Mélissa Le Nevé, who was the first woman to climb the technical difficulty level 8B+

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 WOF 2024 #05: Reconnect One - USA
programme.desc: Sarka and Cheryl, who haven't seen each other in years, have decided to reunite and embark on a tour of their own. Having once traveled together on the contest scene for over 15 years, life led them to different corners of the West Coast of America.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.desc: The 2018 Cape Epic takes riders through 658km through South Africa's Western Cape countryside and up many hills: the total elevation gain will be 13,530m. The race attracts professional and serious amateur participants from around the world.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 WOF 2024 #13: GKA & GWA - Best Of World Cup Cape Verde
programme.desc: Cape Verde is blessed with a moderate climate, north-easterly trade winds and warm ocean swells that break on the islands' reefs, making it a paradise for Kite-Surfing and wingfoiling. Sal island in particular boasts one of the world's greatest right-hand point-breaks.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E24 WOF 2024 #24: Motorsurf World Championship #1
programme.desc: Motorsurf World Championship #1 - Fujairah (UAE) You’ve probably asked yourself many times what to do if you want to surf but the swell isn’t good enough. The athletes from the Motosurf World Championship have the answer. So let´s check out how they performed in Fujairah.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 WOF 2024 #26: Freestyle Pro Tour
programme.desc: Today we are visiting the Windsurfers paradise which is why the Freestyle Pro Tour is visiting it every year for its biggest event of the season. This will be the first ever FPT event that runs all three Freestyle windsurfing disciplines at the same time.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.desc: The 44Cup begins its new season in a venue that for years has formed a cornerstone of the circuit: Puerto Calero in Lanzarote, Canary Islands, owned and operated by the RC44 class’ long term partner Calero Marinas. 2026 marks the 19th year of racing for the RC44s.

programme.title: Cape Epic 2024
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through 617 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 16 500m of climbing.

programme.title: Cape Epic 2024
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through 617 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 16 500m of climbing

programme.title: Cape Epic 2024
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through 617 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 16 500m of climbing.

programme.title: Cape Epic 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E08 Cape Epic 2024 - Final Stage
programme.desc: The Absa Cape Epic is the world’s premier mountain bike stage race. The route changes every year, leading aspiring amateur and professional mountain bikers from around the world through 617 Untamed kilometres of unspoilt scenery and up 16 500m of climbing.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 WOF 2024 #04: Queen & King of the Court #04
programme.desc: The sands of Doha are set to witness the grand finale of the 2023 Queen & King of the Court Crown Series, marking the culmination of a thrilling series of events that kicked off in Miami earlier this year.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2025
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 WOF 2025 #31: DATEV Challenge Roth 2025
programme.desc: The Roth Triathlon took place again on July 6, 2025. The sporting event in this triathlon stronghold has been home to triathletes from all over the world since 1984. It consists of a 3.8 km swim, 180 km bike ride, and 42.2 km run through the Roth triathlon district.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2018
programme.sub-title: S01 : E31 Trans Angeles - MTB - Los Angeles (USA)
programme.desc: It's time for Hans Rey to explore Southern California. What better way to do this than with Tim Commerford, a true rock star and one of mountain biking's brightest legends, Missy Giove?

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 Trans Napoli - A Mountain Bike Expedition Naples (ITA)
programme.desc: TransNapoli is an urban MTB adventure led by legendary mountain bike pioneer Hans Rey. It is a colorful five-day tour that crosses the Amalfi and Naples regions of Italy on mountain bikes and e-bikes.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2019
programme.sub-title: S01 : E23 Frozen Waterfalls - Icekayaking - Iceland
programme.desc: Godafoss is one of the most famous waterfalls in Iceland. Four kayak experts set out to paddle this place and also visit other places in Iceland that - in winter - are not without dangers

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2024
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 WOF 2024 #19: Pasko the Magic Move
programme.desc: Recovering from testicular cancer, professional athlete and filmmaker Maarten Molenaar embarks on a journey to Fuerteventura to learn a new freestyle windsurfing trick - the Pasko.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 WOF 2026 #10 Epic Series - Change is Inevitable
programme.desc: Welcome back to the Epic Series 2026. In this first episode we will dive deep into the heads of the worlds thoughest Mountainbikers who have and will again battle it out in the Cape Epic stagerace. The Absa Cape Epic is a physically gruelling and mentally demanding.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2026
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 WOF 2026 #01: GKA Kite-Surf & Freestyle Kite World Cup Brazil
programme.desc: The GKA Kite-Surf & Freestyle Kite World Cup Brazil is bringing the world’s top riders to Brazil’s iconic coastline. Athletes compete in spectacular heats featuring powerful jumps, technical tricks and creative freestyle performances

programme.title: Nendaz Freeride FWT Challenger - Live delayed Part 1
programme.desc: The third FWT Challenger delivered an unforgettable day full of action on the legendary Mont Gond wall. Perfect conditions for the 63 riders from all over Europe, the USA, New Zealand and Japan.

programme.title: Simple Session 2025 - Skate Finals WOMEN
programme.desc: Simple Session is back at Unibet Arena in Tallinn, Estonia – celebrating its massive 25-year anniversary! A quarter-century of mind-blowing BMX riding and skateboarding, unforgettable moments, and a global community of athletes pushing the limits.Hoppla!

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.desc: ENGADINSNOW is one of the longest-running freeride competitions in the Alps. This parallel freeride event in Silvaplana is unique worldwide and combines 20 years of innovation and freeriding.

programme.title: WORLD OF FREESPORTS 2022
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Open Faces - Season Highlights
programme.desc: Today we present you the Highlights of the Open Faces Event, the chance for riders to qualify for the well-known Freeride World Tour. Junior riders as well as adults have the opportunity to show their skill to the judges.

programme.title: GKA Kite-Surf World Cup 2024 - Dakhla (MAR) - Overall Highlights
programme.desc: The GKA Kite-Surf World Cup 2024 will take place in Dakhla. This Moroccan hotspot is known for its constant winds and breathtaking lagoon and offers perfect conditions for exciting freestyle performances.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Fabricio Santos De Jesus was introduced to Judo as a child while he was still living in Brazil. He was also introduced to Capoeira, becoming Champion of Brazil and International Capoeira Champion. He has been able to transfer his knowledge of the control of movement and is now recognized for this knowledge as a coach in MMA community. Hard Knocks Fighter Jess Elverum, among others, using his teachings to expand their flexibility and dexterity, becoming more fluid and calm in movement.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E15 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: CJ Hollett is a Brazilian Jiu Jitsu Black Belt who loves teaching his craft. He is very well respected as an MMA coach for his technical mindset, high level skills and experience coaching UFC fighters. CJ loves working with MMA fighters because of their hunger to win, and believes it's time for Jiu Jitsu to make a resurgence in the MMA cage.

programme.title: DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 DAY IN THE LIFE OF A COACH
programme.desc: Josh Lee is highly respected in the MMA community for his wrestling skills. In this episode, we follow Josh throughout his day, and see some well known HK fighters who have trained under him, such as Jess Elverum. It is Josh's hope that his ability to transfer his knowledge of wrestling will make big difference in his students' fighting. He would also love to see more people take up wrestling.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Someone with a grudge against 15 Division opens fire on Andy and Chloe.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.sub-title: S04 : E13 You Can See the Stars
programme.desc: The officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy and Dov pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-guard in a diner hold-up.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.sub-title: S05 : E02 All By Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted to Acting Staff Sergeant, and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.sub-title: S05 : E03 Heart Breakers, Money Makers
programme.desc: Inspector Jarvis sends the officers to seize all “proceeds of crime” – anything purchased with illegal money.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: After the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must find the killer before a gang war breaks out.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar, Chris’s erratic behavior make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.sub-title: S05 : E06 Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road for interviews.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.sub-title: S05 : E07 Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: An innocuous call to a middle-class home puts Dov and Chris in the middle of a home invasion investigation.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: 15 Division works on a program to help tenants move out of a subsidized-housing complex that’s being torn down

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: The officers work to find a bomber. But after catching him, they realize he has more targets set to explode.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy is attacked by an intruder at Traci’s place and the Sex Crimes Unit steps in to take over the case.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy debates her future with Sam after learning the heart-breaking news that Marlo is pregnant with his baby.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: A riot breaks out at a women’s prison while Andy, Juliet, Nick, and Gail are there to transfer prisoners.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Nick’s estranged older brother emerges with new information on someone from their tragic past.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: When Traci is a no-show for her first raid, 15 Division fears the gun dealer they’re after has kidnapped her.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: After a baseball game erupts in a drive-by shooting, Gail and her brother search for the shooter.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy and Sam are shocked to learn that Oliver is the prime suspect in IA’s corruption investigation.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy, Dov, Gail, and Nick undertake a risky plan to prove that Commissioner Alonso Santana is corrupt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: A heat wave hits and Jarvis opens the division to the public as a cooling station.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.sub-title: S05 : E21 Breaking Up the Band
programme.desc: Now that Sam and Marlo’s baby girl has arrived, it’s clear nothing could have prepared Andy for this moment.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: With the 15 Division restructure looming, Andy and Sam’s wedding lets the gang celebrate one last hurrah.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: A high-stakes takedown goes awry upon the revelation that rookie cop Andy McNally has busted one of her own.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: As the other rookies hunt for an escaped convict, Swarek lets Andy in on his past undercover exploits.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: The rookie cops duke it out for a cause at “Fite Nite.”

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy trades in her uniform for something more risqué when she goes undercover as a prostitute.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: During a home invasion, Andy is left alone and confronted with a hiding thief who is armed and very volatile.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: A fatal traffic collision reveals a shocking truth, and Andy’s romance with Det. Callaghan gets complicated.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: A heat wave has wreaked havoc on the city, multiplied by growing fears of a serial rapist on the loose.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy and Chris investigate a nightclub beating, but all clues point to a cop.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Girlfriend of the Year
programme.desc: At a highway accident, Chris and Gail stumble upon a car that has a license plate matched to an Amber Alert.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: A botched prisoner transport has Andy and Swarek in a cat-and-mouse game to catch the fugitive.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.sub-title: S01 : E11 To Serve or Protect
programme.desc: Andy’s ex-cop father has confessed that he may have committed a crime during an alcohol-induced blackout.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: It’s time for performance assessments for the rookies as they find out the fate of their careers.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: When an arrest compromises a drug bust, Andy steps up to salvage the bust by going undercover with Swarek.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy's world explodes when a student is killed in a shooting, and a bullet hits Andy, lodging in her vest.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy and Gail go undercover as cocktail waitresses to clean up a drug-infested club.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: As a full moon hangs over the city, the rookies are unnerved by a series of strange occurrences.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: As 15 Division recovers from the shooting of Callaghan, a series of arsons culminates in a laundromat fire.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Using a car dealership, 15 Division runs a sting operation to crack down on suspects with outstanding warrants

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: When an informant is murdered, 15 Division sets its sights on finding a weak link in the East Jameson gang.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 The One That Got Away
programme.desc: When a woman is attacked in the same way as a deceased cop. Callaghan is convinced that it’s the same suspect.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: After a seemingly drunken man collapses in the barn, 15 Division is put under quarantine.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Dov and Gail work together in a stake-out operation to stop an Asian gang from killing a snitch.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: 15 Division’s hunt for an armed robber leads them to the scene of a horrible car accident.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: On an undercover training exercise Traci and Andy stumble upon a woman who is about to die of an overdose.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: When Gail Peck’s uniform is stolen, the rookies go after a vigilante who is impersonating a police officer.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: While Swarek is brutally interrogated, the rookies help Andy solve a mystery that may reveal Swarek’s location

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.sub-title: S03 : E01 The First Day of the Rest of Your Life
programme.desc: When a girl vanishes from the scene of a multi-car accident, Andy connects the girl to a 7-year-old cold case.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: As high schools wind to a close for summer, dangerous pranks abound – including the theft of a police car.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Dov Epstein happens upon a convenience store robbery-in-progress that results in him shooting a black teenager

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Hell breaks loose when a carload of girls from a bachelorette party hits another vehicle, killing the driver.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: When Andy answers a domestic disturbance call, the social worker turns out to be her estranged mother.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: A noise complaint leads Andy and Swarek to an illegal warehouse party, and to an injured John Doe.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: A gifted psychic (or a gifted conman) helps find the missing witness in an organized-crime case.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: While investigating the disappearance of an escort, the officers discover a pattern of missing women.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division are forced to release a suspected predator for lack of evidence.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division are reeling in the aftermath of the unexpected death of one of their colleagues.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Staff Sergeant Frank Best decides it_s time for his officers to get back on track.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy and Nick investigate a torched van. It belongs a street priest who's been receiving death threats.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: When a child abductor escapes from an emergency hospital visit, 15 Division goes on the hunt for the criminal.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: After months working undercover, Andy and Nick’s operation goes sideways when Nick - then Andy - go missing.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: On her first day back at 15 Division, Andy must work with Swarek to track down an ex-convict.

programme.title: Rookie Blue
programme.desc: Andy is partnered with Swarek’s new girlfriend, Officer Marlo Cruz.
