programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E100 A Duel in Ruins: Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma is put to the ultimate test when a Number Guardian traps his friends and forces him to battle for their freedom!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E101 The Dark Mist Rises: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuma searches for the second Mythyrian Number and ends up finding an old nemesis who is out for revenge!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E102 The Dark Mist Rises: Part 2
programme.desc: Every time Astral attacks, he puts Yuma’s life in danger, but if he doesn’t attack, he’s a goner himself! It’s a no-win situation in the cruelest duel yet!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Alito’s back in the ring to take down Yuma, but a fair fight isn’t in the cards when Alito has one of Yuma’s friends in his corner!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Nistro’s under Alito’s control, and it’s up to Yuma and Dextra to free him! Can this tag team duo bob and weave their way past Alito’s attacks, or will this Barian knock out any chances they have of winning?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E105 Put to the Test: Part 1
programme.desc: The hunt for the Mythyrian Numbers leads our heroes to the peak of a perilous mountain where Kite’s skills are put to the test by a dragon-wielding Number Guardian!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E106 Put to the Test: Part 2
programme.desc: Kite faces his toughest challenge ever when a powerful Number Guardian threatens to take possession of his Galaxy-Eyes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: After an ancient statue is unearthed, Yuma finds himself between a rock and a furry place when he discovers that there’s more to Girag than meets the eye – like a red nose and whiskers!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E108 A Sea of Troubles: Part 1
programme.desc: It’s rough waters ahead for Yuma and his friends when the search for the last two Mythyrian Numbers leads them to an ancient ruin that lies beneath the bottom of the ocean!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E109 A Sea of Troubles: Part 2
programme.desc: The battle beneath the ocean reaches new depths of danger when Shark comes face to face with the Number Guardian, Abyss!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E110 A World of Chaos: Part 1
programme.desc: Earth and Astral World are under attack! Yuma and Astral are the only ones who can stop it, but saving their planets may come at the ultimate price…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E111 A World of Chaos: Part 2
programme.desc: The battle between our two heroes and Number 96 comes to a shocking conclusion that leaves only one person standing!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Someone’s stealing memories, and the Super Secret Numbers Club are going to find out who! But when the hunters become the hunted, Yuma’s friends quickly realize that they need help from an exterminator!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Yuma and Trey team up to take down a bugged out Barian who likes to munch on memories! Can Yuma and Trey swat down this winged menace before he swoops in to drain their brains?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E114 Tentacles of Terror: Part 1
programme.desc: With Vector’s patience for failure fading fast, Mr. Heartland begs for a final chance to beat Yuma! Desperate to deliver, Heartland deploys his most dangerous duelist to date, a treacherous Barian armed with toxic tentacles!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E115 Tentacles of Terror: Part 2
programme.desc: Shark and Quattro struggle to keep their heads above water as they battle the Barian duelist from the deep, Chironex!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E116 Now or Never: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuma’s all set to travel across the stars to save Astral, but an unexpected pest pops by to plunder Yuma’s plans!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E117 Now or Never: Part 2
programme.desc: Kite and Quinton team up to swat down the bug-eyed Barian Scritch! But when Kite starts hallucinating, Quinton must fend off their flying foe while simultaneously steering clear of his confused partner’s attacks!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E118 Mission: Astral World: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuma’s mission to find Astral turns into a high-stakes race against time when Yuma learns the Guardian of Astral World plans to erase his best friend from existence!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E119 Mission: Astral World: Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma faces his toughest challenge yet when he battles against an opponent who can draw the exact card he needs every turn!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E120 Mission: Astral World: Part 3
programme.desc: Yuma fights to free his best friend Astral in a duel he cannot win but must not lose! Meanwhile, Shark comes face-to-face with his past and learns the truth about his Barian background!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E121 Mission: Astral World: Part 4
programme.desc: With Astral’s fate hanging in the balance, the heart-pounding battle between Yuma and Astral World’s Guardian thunders to its frenzied finish!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: To get a lead on Yuma and his buddies, Vector bombards Earth with bogus Numbers. When one of them takes the bait, it puts Mr. Heartland and his sinister swarm of insect monsters hot on the gang’s heels!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: With Kite grounded, Yuma and Astral step up to take the buzzing Barian, Mr. Heartland down! Can our heroes repel this pest, or will they end up getting squashed instead?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E124 Battle with the Barians
programme.desc: When all seven Barian Emperors ambush Yuma, some friendly faces drop in to help take the Barians out!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E125 Fight for a Friend
programme.desc: Quattro faces off against the Barian leader, Nash! Hoping to find Shark swimming just beneath his new Barian identity, Quattro looks to hook his old friend and reel him back in!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E126 Farewell for a Friend
programme.desc: The back and forth battle between Nash and Quattro comes to a climactic conclusion! Will this battle lure the real Shark out from inside his Barian form, or will it cost Quattro much more than he ever could have imagined?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E127 Settling the Score: Part 1
programme.desc: Looking to get revenge for their brother Quattro, Trey and Quinton team up to take down the treacherous Barian, Mizar!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E128 Settling the Score: Part 2
programme.desc: As Quinton and Trey's devastating double duel against Mizar flares to a feverish finish, the brothers reveal the real reason they are battling the Barian! Their startling secret hits Mizar harder than any attack!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E129 Fists of Fury: Part 1
programme.desc: Yuma and Astral's race to face Don Thousand is stopped cold by the hot-blooded Alito, now brainwashed by the Barian deity! Can they think fast enough to free Alito of Don Thousand, or will he take the two down for the count?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E130 Fists of Fury: Part 2
programme.desc: Yuma and Astral duel desperately to try and turn an old enemy into their newest ally, but with Don Thousand in Alito’s corner, Yuma and Astral find themselves up against the ropes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Vector sets his sights on squashing Marin and Dumon, and there’s nothing Shark can do but watch his sister and best friend squirm before his eyes.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: The thunderous battle between Marin, Dumon and Vector shatters expectations as it nears its startling end! Meanwhile, Alito stands tall against his former friend, the Barian behemoth - Girag!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Marin's duel with Vector charges to its climactic conclusion! Can Marin outduel this venomous villain, or will Vector remain invincible?!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: The long foreshadowed faceoff is finally here! Kite and Mizar go toe-to-toe to settle who is the one true Galaxy-Eyes master!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: The fierce face-off between Kite and Mizar soars to new heights as their battle to determine the one true Galaxy-Eyes master roars to a finish!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Nash races to face Vector, but with Vector's enhanced strength, he may be speeding towards his own demise!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E137 Clash of the Emperors
programme.desc: While Nash and Vector's danger-fueled duel hits dizzying new heights of havoc, the truth behind Vector’s dark past is revealed!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Yuma teams up with an unlikely ally to take down the great Barian deity, Don Thousand! Can this twosome draw out a victory, or will Don Thousand douse any hope these heroes have of being victorious?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Yuma and Shark’s battle with Don Thousand takes a treacherous turn when the great Barian deity reveals he can rewrite their cards into entirely different cards! Can Yuma and Shark defeat a foe who can change their every move?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E140 A Thousand Ways to Lose
programme.desc: Yuma and Shark turn the tides and put Don Thousand on the brink of defeat, but DonThousand still has a thousand tricks up his sleeve!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E141 The Fate of Three Worlds
programme.desc: Once friends, now foes - Yuma and Shark face off in a battle where winning could mean losing everything!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E142 The Battle of Three Worlds
programme.desc: Winning comes with the ultimate price when Yuma realizes victory will cost more than just losing his friendship with Shark, it will mean losing Shark forever!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.sub-title: S03 : E143 The Future of Three Worlds
programme.desc: Expect the unexpected as the game-changing conclusion of Yuma’s duel against Shark flares to a frenzied finish!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Having gathered all one hundred Numbers, Astral is finally prepared to fulfill his mission – to destroy Barian World! But in order to see his mission through, Astral will have to destroy his friendship with Yuma first!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: The battle between Yuma and Astral rages on as the best of friends become the fiercest of foes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: The battle between Yuma and Astral rages on as the best of friends become the fiercest of foes!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL
programme.desc: Feel the flow for the final time as Yuma and Astral high-five the sky in the cosmic conclusion to Yu-Gi-Oh! ZEXAL!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E01 The Heart of the Cards
programme.desc: When the #1 ranked duelist and ruthless tycoon, Seto Kaiba, kidnaps Yugi’s Grandpa to get the rare Blue-Eyes White Dragon card, Yugi must face Kaiba in the ultimate Duel Monsters showdown!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E02 The Gauntlet Is Thrown
programme.desc: Yugi is forced to face Duel Monsters creator, Maximillion Pegasus, in the mysterious Shadow Realm where all the monsters and magic are real. If Yugi loses, Pegasus claims Grandpa’s soul as his prize!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E03 Journey to the Duelist Kingdom
programme.desc: Yugi gives up one of his own Star Chips so Joey can board the boat bound for Duelist Kingdom and duel to save his sister’s eyesight. Meanwhile, the cheat Weevil tries to cripple Yugi’s deck by tossing his best cards overboard!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E04 Into The Hornet's Nest
programme.desc: Pegasus announces that there are many strange secrets that will make his ultimate tournament unlike any they’ve ever had. Yugi must not only figure the rules out, but master them if he’s to survive!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E05 The Ultimate Great Moth
programme.desc: After Yugi defeats Weevil’s first wave of Duel Monsters, Weevil has one last trick up his sleeve; a ravenous Great Moth that grows in power every turn! Can Yugi find a way to destroy this winged beast before it destroys him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey finds himself courageously accepting a challenge from veteran duelist, Mai. But when Mai begins to demonstrate an unnerving psychic ability, Joey has to figure out Mai’s secret strategy before falling victim to it!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E07 Attack from the Deep
programme.desc: The fisherman duelist baits Yugi into a duel on his own sea playing field for a home-field advantage. Can Yugi adapt to these new settings to turn the tide of battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi is eliminated from the tournament, KaibaCorp’s crooked Board of Directors will transfer control of the company from Kaiba to Pegasus! Kaiba’s brother Mokuba challenges Yugi to a duel to protect his brother’s company!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E09 Duel With a Ghoul
programme.desc: Yugi must duel a magical doppelganger of Kaiba. But with his best cards resting at the bottom of the ocean, Yugi must discover a new strategy to survive fake Kaiba’s powerful Blue-Eyes White Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E10 Give up the Ghost
programme.desc: Yugi defeats Blue-Eyes White Dragon, but there are two more waiting in the wings! Will the real Kaiba reach Yugi in time to help beat this impersonator?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey decides to battle Rex Raptor without his friends’ help to prove that he is man enough to take care of Serenity on his own. But as Rex Raptor’s relentless dinos destroys Joey’s best Duel Monsters, will Tristan’s card remind him that with his friends, he is never alone in battle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey duels valiantly, but Rex Raptor has unleashed his secret weapon: Red-Eyes B. Dragon! Joey must figure out the secret of Yugi’s gift, the Time Wizard card, without Yugi’s help or he’s taking the next boat out of Duelist Kingdom!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E13 Evil Spirit of the Ring
programme.desc: Yugi’s classmate Bakura, possessed by his Millennium Ring’s dark powers, traps Yugi and friends in a Shadow Game where they become the cards themselves! Not only must Yugi battle to avoid becoming a permanent part of the card game, but also free Bakura’s soul from the Millennium Ring’s control!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E14 The Light at the End of the Tunnel
programme.desc: Pegasus’s hired duelist PaniK cheats Mai of all her Star Chips, and Yugi vows to defeat him and win them back. But when PaniK’s Castle of Dark Illusions enshrouds his monsters in a black mist, how can Yugi defeat an enemy he cannot see?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Despite his astonishing disadvantage, Yugi boldly provokes PaniK: “I’ll finish you in three turns.” Is Yugi bluffing, or does he have the advantage in this battle of wits?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E16 The Scars of Defeat
programme.desc: Kaiba descends to the kingdom to face Pegasus! Has Kaiba changed since his battle with Yugi, or is he still the same merciless duelist? A battle between Kaiba’s Blue-Eyes White Dragon and Joey’s Red-Eyes B. Dragon holds the answers!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E17 Arena of Lost Souls, Part 1
programme.desc: The #1 American duelist Bandit Keith’s gang kidnaps Joey to a secret cave with a graveyard playing field. As Yugi and friends search for him, Joey faces Bandit Keith’s zombie monsters which become stronger as they return from the grave! Joey is all alone in the battle this time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E18 Arena of Lost Souls, Part 2
programme.desc: Joey’s last ditch effort, his lucky Time Wizard card, fails against Bandit Keith’s zombie monsters. But as his lucky streak comes to an end, will his improving skills as a duelist and his love for his sister inspire him to victory?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Double Trouble Duel, Part 1
programme.desc: Trapped in the labyrinth cave, Yugi and friends find an alternate exit, but the door is guarded by Pegasus’s Paradox Brothers. Yugi and Joey will no longer be battling solo; they band together in a team battle against the Paradox Brothers! The battle for all the Star Chips and entrance to Pegasus’s castle is on the line!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Double Trouble Duel, Part 2
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey pool their strengths and manage to fend off their opponents’ monsters, but things are about to change as the Paradox Brothers summon the almighty Gate Guardian, a monster that reflects all attacks! Is Joey helping Yugi in this duel, or his lack of experience sealing their fate for defeat?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E21 Double Trouble Duel, Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi and Joey each unleash their strongest monster, Summoned Skull and Red-Eyes B. Dragon, but their strength pales in comparison to the tremendous power of Gate Guardian. Individually, our heroes have no chance, but they will unleash the greatest power of all: teamwork!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Using the magic of the Millennium Eye, Pegasus traps Mokuba’s soul inside a card right before Kaiba’s eyes! In order to earn the right to challenge Pegasus, Kaiba must first beat Yugi and take his Star Chips. The rematch between Yugi and Kaiba is about to begin!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Kaiba summons Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon, the strongest monster in the game fused from three Blue-Eyes White Dragons! Yugi has lost all his powerful Duel Monsters, but a true duelist never gives up!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi begins spinning a strategy to put Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon to rest, but he must decide whether to claim victory or spare Kaiba his life. Yugi’s heart is split in two!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Having lost his Star Chips to Kaiba and his only opportunity to save Grandpa, Yugi is in a state of shock. Can Téa bring Yugi back to consciousness by defeating Mai for her extra Star Chips and teach Yugi the heart of the duelist?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E26 Champion Vs. Creator, Part 1
programme.desc: Yugi and friends enter the castle to discover Kaiba ready to duel Pegasus with Mokuba’s soul hanging in the balance! The power of the Millennium Eye gives Pegasus the ability to read other people’s minds. Can Kaiba defeat an opponent who knows his moves even before he does?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E27 Champion Vs. Creator, Part 2
programme.desc: Kaiba is helpless against Pegasus’s Toon World deck and mind-reading abilities. As the duel ends, Pegasus imprisons Kaiba’s soul into a card, just like Grandpa and Mokuba! Yugi has had enough!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: T’was the night before the final battle, and many creatures are stirring! Yugi vows to overthrow Pegasus for the sake of his Grandpa. Tristan leads an exploration party to uncover Pegasus’s secrets. While Joey sleeps, Bandit Keith steals from him the card that permits his entry in the final battle!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Under Pegasus’s weighty glare, Yugi is distracted from his duel with Mai. After making foolish tactical errors and allowing Mai to gain a huge advantage with her Harpie's Pet Dragon, will Yugi gather his focus or succumb to the intense pressure?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mai has rebounded from her previous loss to Joey to become a better duelist. Has Yugi learned from his loss to Kaiba, or is the emotional defeat still weighing on his heart? The answer is in the cards!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey frantically searches for the card that permits him to enter the final battle, not realizing Bandit Keith has stolen it from him. As he struggles to accept the fact that Serenity will be blind forever, he receives help from a new, and unexpected, friend!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After Bandit Keith’s Machine deck forces Joey to take the defensive, Joey mimics Keith’s battle strategy to metalicize his Red-Eyes B. Dragon! Is victory assured, or does the cheater Bandit Keith literally have one last card up his sleeve?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E33 Best of Friends Best of Duelists, Part 1
programme.desc: With his pride in his strength as a duelist on the line, Joey challenges Yugi for the right to face Pegasus. In a battle between friends, a fierce match ensues between the two people who know each other’s strategies and cards as they struggle to keep their thoughts of past loyalties at the back of their minds.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E34 Best of Friends Best of Duelists, Part 2
programme.desc: Yugi is shocked as Joey uses the Time Wizard card on him, the very card he gave Joey as a sign of friendship! However, as the two battle each other valiantly and one comes out the victor, they find confirmation of the strength of their friendship that surpasses any duel.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E35 Yugi vs. Pegasus Match of the Millennium, Part 1
programme.desc: Yugi prepares for the ultimate battle against Pegasus with the souls of Grandpa, Kaiba and Mokuba on the line. Meanwhile, Tristan and Bakura infiltrate the castle to find the Kaiba brothers, but at this crucial moment, is Bakura turning back into his evil self again?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E36 Yugi vs. Pegasus Match of the Millennium, Part 2
programme.desc: Pegasus punishes Yugi using the same Toon Deck and mind-reading abilities he used on Kaiba. As Pegasus turns Yugi’s monsters against him, Yugi loses the will to battle. Will Pegasus capture Yugi’s soul into a card, just like Kaiba?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E37 Yugi vs. Pegasus Match of the Millennium, Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi has found a counter to Pegasus’s mind-reading ability: Yugi switches back and forth between his two souls! Yugi is able to destroy Pegasus’s Toon World, but the duel has just only begun. The next level of the deadly Shadow Game is about to start!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E38 Yugi vs. Pegasus Match of the Millennium, Part 4
programme.desc: Yugi crumples in exhaustion under the crippling power of the Shadow Game. His friends yell desperate encouragement, but their voices cannot penetrate the sphere of darkness. Yugi’s chance at victory is slipping away, as is his life!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E39 Yugi vs. Pegasus Match of the Millennium, Part 5
programme.desc: Pegasus summons Relinquished, a fearsome monster that can consume Yugi’s Duel Monsters! Yugi counters with… Kuriboh? The smallest, weakest creature in the game? Has Yugi given up, or does he have one last strategy to snatch victory from the jaws of defeat? The Shadow Game comes to a close!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pegasus Saga comes to an end, but a new journey is about to begin! Yugi meets a mysterious Egyptian named Shadi who enters Yugi’s mind with the Millennium Key. What are these Millennium Items, and do they hold the answer to the mystery behind the Shadow Games?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E41 The Wrath of Rebecca
programme.desc: Yugi and friends return from the Duelist Kingdom only to meet a young girl named Rebecca who demands that Grandpa return Blue-Eyes White Dragon to her! She’s here to claim back the card that Grandpa stole from her grandfather many years ago!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Rebecca mistakenly believes that Grandpa stole Blue-Eyes White Dragon from her grandfather. Yugi must defend Blue-Eyes White Dragon to teach her that it’s not the power of the cards, but the heart that’s in them that counts.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The two-faced Board of Directors of KaibaCorp trap Kaiba inside a virtual reality game! Mokuba recruits Yugi and Joey to free Kaiba from this ultimate game where losing equals death!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The quest for Kaiba continues with a little help from… Mai? But can Yugi and friends adapt to a virtual world where the rules and strategies keep changing every step of the way?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and friends rescue Kaiba, but they are still stuck in the game! The only exit is past Five-Headed Dragon, but in the difficult duel, Joey, Mokuba, and Mai lose all their life points! Can Yugi and Kaiba, two former opponents, work together and face the biggest enemy of their lives?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E46 Dungeon Dice Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: A new student, Duke Devlin, defeats Joey in a game of Duel Monsters, forcing Joey to become his servant. Duke forces Joey to wear a dog costume and humiliates him in public, forcing Yugi to challenge Duke to a duel. However, this will not be a Duel Monsters duel, but a new game named Dungeon Dice Monsters!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E47 Dungeon Dice Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: In exchange for Joey’s freedom, Yugi agrees to give up Duel Monsters forever if he loses. Unfamiliar with the rules, Yugi gets off to a rough start. His chances do not improve as Duke reveals that he designed Dungeon Dice Monsters with Pegasus’s aid! Can Yugi learn the new complex rules, much less form a strategy, before he is soundly defeated?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E48 Dungeon Dice Monsters, Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi uses his innate gaming skills to turn the tables on Duke, but Duke has one more rule to mention: All creatures take up territory on the grid-like board. With no room to summon any new monsters, Yugi’s position is helpless!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S01 : E49 Dungeon Dice Monsters, Part 4
programme.desc: After Duke’s all-powerful Orgoth the Relentless dices Yugi’s entire cadre of monsters into shreds, Yugi only has one turn left before he loses all his heart points! Yugi’s last hope rests in one final dice roll in the thrilling conclusion to Dungeon Dice Monsters!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E01 The Mystery Duelist, Part 1
programme.desc: An arcane fortune teller steals the Millennium Puzzle, and Yugi must defeat him in a duel to win it back! However, this is no ordinary soothsayer; he’s a familiar and formidable foe from Duelist Kingdom… or is he? Can Yugi beat him all alone without the help of his friends or the spirit inside the Puzzle?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E02 The Mystery Duelist, Part 2
programme.desc: The mysterious menace controlling Bandit Keith shatters the Millennium Puzzle into pieces before setting the dueling arena ablaze! Can Yugi put the Millennium Puzzle back together and save the spirit before the entire room is engulfed in flames?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E03 The Past Is Present
programme.desc: The origin of Duel Monsters is revealed! Using the magic of the Millennium Necklace, Egyptian historian Ishizu Ishtar shows Kaiba how Duel Monsters was played millenniums ago! The ancient games have resurrected in modern times, along with three almighty beasts of unstoppable devastation – the Egyptian God Monsters!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The spirit of the Millennium Puzzle realizes that his memories of ancient Egypt have faded, but Téa is going to help him uncover the mysteries of his past! However, their search is interrupted by the dancing duelist Johnny Steps and his musical monsters of rock!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: To face the future, Yugi must first look into the past! Yugi learns that he was a powerful Pharaoh who saved the world five thousand years ago, and he must now save the world again! Meanwhile, Kaiba tests the hidden powers of his Egyptian God Card Obelisk the Tormentor against the fury of Blue-Eyes Ultimate Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Stalked by the Rare Hunters
programme.desc: Joey is cornered by a group of sinister Rare Hunters who force Joey into a duel where if Joey loses, the Rare Hunters get his precious Red-Eyes B. Dragon! Though Joey pummels his foes with his mighty monster armada, eliminating life points isn’t the only path to victory…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E07 Yugi vs. Rare Hunter, Part 1: Battle City Begins
programme.desc: It’s time to master new rules and monsters; let the Battle City Tournament commence! In the first duel of the tournament, Yugi challenges the Rare Hunter to win back Joey’s Red-Eyes B. Dragon. However, Yugi’s falling into the same trap that led to Joey’s demise!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Yugi vs. Rare Hunter, Part 2: Up Against Exodia
programme.desc: Yugi figures out the Rare Hunter’s strategy to summon the almighty Exodia, but it’s too late to stop him! The Rare Hunter already has four pieces of Exodia in his hand, and the fifth and final piece is on top of his deck! How can Yugi stop the unstoppable Exodia?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E08 Yugi vs. Rare Hunter, Part 2: Up Against Exodia
programme.desc: Yugi figures out the Rare Hunter’s strategy to summon the almighty Exodia, but it’s too late to stop him! The Rare Hunter already has four pieces of Exodia in his hand, and the fifth and final piece is on top of his deck! How can Yugi stop the unstoppable Exodia?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E09 The ESP Duelist, Part 1
programme.desc: The psychic duelist Espa Roba defeats Rex Raptor as easy as a chumpasaurus, and Joey’s next on his hit list! What chance does Joey have when Espa Roba has the telepathic ability to read all the cards in Joey’s hand?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E10 The ESP Duelist, Part 2
programme.desc: Joey discovers that Espa Roba’s extrasensory perception is a hoax, but he’s not yet free from Espa's mental manipulations! Espa Roba’s Jinzo not only slaughters all of Joey’s monsters, but it grows in power every turn! Joey’s luck has come to an end… or has it?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 The Master of Magicians, Part 1
programme.desc: The magician duelist Arkana transports Yugi to the world’s most lethal dueling arena where the loser gets sent to the Shadow Realm! Yugi must win this duel or he'll lose much more than his Dark Magician!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E12 The Master of Magicians, Part 2
programme.desc: It’s Dark Magician versus Dark Magician! However, while Yugi only controls one Dark Magician, Arkana has three residing in his deck! Though outnumbered, Yugi will never give up, as long as he believes in the heart of the cards!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E13 The Master of Magicians, Part 3
programme.desc: To counter Arkana’s Dark Magician, Yugi pulls a rabbit out of his hat: Dark Magician Girl! It’s the battle of the sexes to determine the true master of magicians!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E14 Playing With a Parasite, Part 1
programme.desc: The trickster Weevil Underwood spins a web of lies to bait Joey into a lopsided duel! Weevil secretly infests Joey’s deck with a parasite that prevents Joey from summoning strong monsters! Without the support of his most powerful beasts, what chance does Joey have against a monster that even Yugi didn’t dare face at Duelist Kingdom: Perfectly Ultimate Great Moth!?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E15 Playing With a Parasite, Part 2
programme.desc: Joey swats Perfectly Ultimate Great Moth only to have Weevil let loose the ferocious Insect Queen, the crown jewel of insects that grows in strength for every creepy crawler it cannibalizes! Will Weevil’s royal ravager swarm Joey into submission?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi faces off against another of Marik’s nefarious Rare Hunters – the silent but deadly Strings! Strings stops all of Yugi’s attacks with Revival Jam, a slippery slime that resurrects whenever it’s destroyed! How can Yugi win if he can’t even put a dent in Strings’s life points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Strings summons one of the most powerful creatures in the history of Duel Monsters... the Egyptian God Monster Slifer the Sky Dragon! What chance does Yugi’s band of mortal monsters have against an Egyptian God?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The spell Infinite Cards allows Strings to hold an unlimited number of cards in his hand, so Strings’s Slifer the Sky Dragon can grow to infinite attack power! Can Yugi discover Slifer’s one fatal flaw before he’s annihilated by tens of thousands of attack points?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey squares off against the sea duelist Mako Tsunami and his bevy of underwater beasts! If Joey wins, he’ll have all six Locator Cards necessary to enter the Battle City Finals, but if he loses, he can kiss the finals goodbye! However, little does Joey realize that he has bigger problems than this duel; the Rare Hunters are closing in on his location…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mako’s oceanic warrior The Legendary Fisherman unleashes a wave of destruction by stealthily destroying Joey’s monsters from the depths of the sea! Joey has to put his skills, training and experience to the ultimate test before he’s all washed out!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E21 Double Duel, Part 1: Yugi and Kaiba Vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Abductions abound! Marik, with the help of Bakura, kidnaps Joey and Téa! To make matters worse, the Rare Hunters also kidnap Mokuba to force Yugi and Kaiba to take on tag team duelists Umbra and Lumis on top of a skyscraper! The losers will be sent plummeting into the Shadow Realm!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E22 Double Duel, Part 2: Yugi and Kaiba Vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Lumis and Umbra systematically dismantle Yugi and Kaiba’s tumultuous teamwork! Can Yugi and Kaiba learn to put their differences aside before they’re sent on a one-way trip into the Shadow Realm?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E23 Double Duel, Part 3: Yugi and Kaiba Vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba start to exhibit signs of teamwork, but it’s too little too late when Umbra and Lumis summon Masked Beast Des Gardius, a monstrous menace even more powerful than Blue-Eyes White Dragon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E24 Double Duel, Part 4: Yugi and Kaiba Vs. Lumis and Umbra
programme.desc: Yugi combines his magnetic monsters into the polar powerhouse Valkyrion the Magna Warrior! However, little does Yugi know that Umbra and Lumis have one final mask to turn Yugi’s monsters against him…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Kaiba are on a rescue mission to save their friends! But along the way, all their worries and secrets are revealed as they relive the troubles they’ve faced… and will be facing in the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E26 Friends 'Til the End, Part 1
programme.desc: It’s friend vs. friend as Marik mind controls Joey to duel against Yugi! The loser will be dragged into the ocean to sleep with the fishes! Can Yugi break Joey out of his spell, or will Joey break Yugi?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E27 Friends 'Til the End, Part 2
programme.desc: Though Joey decimates Yugi’s life points, Yugi can’t bring himself to attack his dear friend! Yugi summons Joey’s favorite monster Red-Eyes B. Dragon to try to bring Joey back to his senses. Will seeing his favorite card help Joey break Marik’s spell, or is Yugi’s last ditch effort a lost cause?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E28 Friends 'Til the End, Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi starts to break Marik’s spell over Joey, but he now must duel without the Millennium Puzzle! When Joey draws the card he needs to decimate Yugi’s life points, what chance does Yugi have, especially on his own?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E29 Friends 'Til the End, Part 4
programme.desc: There’s only one minute left in the duel before the loser is sent plummeting to the depths of the sea! Will these best friends actually send each other to their doom? However, there may be a special savior who just regained her eyesight…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E30 Shadow of a Duel
programme.desc: It’s the battle of the ghouls as Bakura unleashes his army of ghosts against Bonz’s zealous zombies for the right to enter the Battle City Finals! But for whom will the final bell toll when this duel is played in the Shadow Realm…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It’s the game of love as Hollywood heartthrob Jean-Claude Magnum challenges Mai to a duel in order to win her hand in marriage! Will Mai succumb to Jean-Claude’s charm, not to mention his cadre of ninja monsters, or will she send him packing back to Tinseltown?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E32 Let the Finals Begin!
programme.desc: Let the Battle City Finals begin! The eight finalists will have their skill and endurance put to the ultimate test in a dueling arena thousands of feet in the sky! Yugi and friends finally meet the other finalists, but none of them are who they appear to be…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E33 The Dark Spirit Revealed: Yugi Vs. Bakura, Part 1
programme.desc: It’s the first duel of the Battle City Finals as Yugi squares off against the evil spirit of the Millennium Ring that's possessing Bakura! Yugi quickly dispatches Bakura’s grotesque ghouls, but Bakura has a sinister strategy straight from the graveyard…

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E34 The Dark Spirit Revealed: Yugi Vs. Bakura, Part 2
programme.desc: Bakura activates Destiny Board, which will cause Yugi to lose automatically in five turns! If that’s not bad enough, Bakura’s Dark Sanctuary damages Yugi’s life points every time Yugi attacks! Unable to attack and running out of time, Yugi’s trapped!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E35 The Dark Spirit Revealed: Yugi Vs. Bakura, Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi’s Slifer the Sky Dragon is about to unleash the final blow to win the duel, but Bakura may not survive the blast from the almighty Egyptian God Monster! Will Yugi attack and advance in the finals, or will he surrender to save Bakura’s life but lose the only chance to protect the world from Marik’s evil?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E36 Rage of the Egyptian Gods
programme.desc: The origin of the Egyptian God Cards is finally revealed! The mysterious Shadi takes Yugi on a journey back in time to the creation of Duel Monsters… and the dangerous powers it released!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E37 Awakening of Evil, Part 1
programme.desc: In the second duel of the Battle City Finals, Odion, disguised as Marik, befuddles Joey with numerous traps to bring the duel to a stalemate. However, Joey has Giant Trunade, the perfect counter to Odion’s strategy that guarantees Joey victory… or is Joey falling into another trap?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E38 Awakening of Evil, Part 2
programme.desc: Odion’s Embodiments of Apophis run roughshod over Joey’s monsters… and his life points! Can Joey effectively utilize the monsters he won earlier in the tournament, or is he already too flustered to mount a successful counterattack?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E39 Awakening of Evil, Part 3
programme.desc: It’s a feeding frenzy as Odion’s Serket devours Joey’s monsters to morph into greater and powerful stages of evolution! How can Joey defeat Serket when it ingests Joey’s monsters whenever they’re summoned on to the field?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E40 Awakening of Evil, Part 4
programme.desc: Odion uses a phony Egyptian God Card to summon the third Egyptian God Monster The Winged Dragon of Ra and targets it to annihilate the rest of Joey’s life points! However, is Odion able to control the ultimate power of an Egyptian God, or will The Winged Dragon of Ra punish all those unworthy of summoning it?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E41 Mind Game: Mai Vs. Marik, Part 1
programme.desc: The third duel of the Battle City Finals between Mai and Marik is no ordinary duel; it’s a battle in the dreaded Shadow Realm where losing life points equals losing your memories! As Marik’s true sinister self comes to the surface, does Mai stand a chance against this malevolent evil?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E42 Mind Game: Mai Vs. Marik, Part 2
programme.desc: As Mai loses more and more of her memories under Marik’s relentless assault, she loses confidence in her dueling abilities. Will Yugi and friends’ neverending support bring her back to victory, or will her shattered mind be trapped in the Shadow Realm for eternity?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E43 Mind Game: Mai Vs. Marik, Part 3
programme.desc: Mai gains control of Marik’s The Winged Dragon of Ra, but she’s unable to decipher how to unleash its massively powerful abilities! Can Mai solve the mystery of the Egyptian God Card before Marik solves it himself and incinerates Mai with the full fury of The Winged Dragon of Ra?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E44 A Duel With Destiny: Kaiba Vs. Ishizu, Part 1
programme.desc: In the fourth duel of the Battle City Finals, Kaiba’s mystery opponent is… Ishizu! With the power of her Millennium Necklace, Ishizu can see the future, including every card Kaiba is planning to play! Does Kaiba stand a chance against an opponent who knows his moves even before he does?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E45 A Duel With Destiny: Kaiba Vs. Ishizu, Part 2
programme.desc: Ishizu, using the magic of her Millennium Necklace, has already seen the outcome of the duel – she will defeat Kaiba with her trap! How can Kaiba win when it’s already destined that he will lose? It’s time for Kaiba to change the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Marik’s evil grows, Ishizu reveals the secrets of her bloodline: How did Marik transform from a kind child into a power-hungry tyrant out for world domination? Can Yugi save Marik from the edge of darkness, or is he already beyond salvation?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E47 Showdown in the Shadows: Marik Vs. Bakura, Part 1
programme.desc: With their previous pact broken, Bakura duels Marik for the right to control the Millennium Rod and the Millennium Ring, and the loser will be trapped inside the Shadow Realm forever! To tip the odds, Bakura gains an unexpected ally in the form of… another Marik?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S02 : E48 Showdown in the Shadows: Marik Vs. Bakura, Part 2
programme.desc: Bakura and good Marik summon The Winged Dragon of Ra, ready to blast and banish evil Marik into the Shadow Realm! But The Winged Dragon of Ra has more than one special ability, and evil Marik knows how to use them all!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: As Kaiba’s blimp speeds towards KaibaCorp Island for the final rounds of the Battle City Tournament, the ship is hijacked by a mysterious boy named Noah and his henchmen – five familiar foes from Yugi and Kaiba’s past who are out for revenge! With the power of cyberspace on Noah’s side, Yugi and friends are trapped inside a new and dangerous Duel Monsters game!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E02 Isolated in Cyber Space — Part 1"
programme.desc: Noah displays the power of his virtual world by splitting up Yugi’s gang and flinging them into the far reaches of his self-created universe! The first to duel under the all-new Deck Master System is Yugi against Big 1 Gansley’s Deepsea Warrior! Can Yugi master the complex new rules, or will the rules master him?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E03 Isolated in Cyber Space — Part 2
programme.desc: Yugi faces off against Gansley, in the form of "Deepsea Warrior", but struggles with the complexities of the dueling field and the new rules. Tea faces peril from a vicious tribe of cyclopses while Kaiba and Mokuba are brought to a setting similar to their old orphanage.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.sub-title: S03 : E04 Isolated in Cyber Space — Part 3
programme.desc: Yugi's strategy is hindered by Gansley's Deck Master ability. Tristan and Duke face a mean dinosaur to save Serenity. Meanwhile, Kaiba and Mokuba confront painful visions of their miserable childhood, but within the heartache may lurk the key to Noah's true intentions.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Téa is led by a penguin to Crump, in the form of Nightmare Penguin, who challenges her to a duel. She learns immediately that dueling in the virtual realm differs starkly from her previous duels, and starts to succumb to the virtual playing field.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Despite gaining a lead with Maha Vailo, Téa falls behind as Crump begins an assault on her life points, causing the ice around her to grow. With the help of her Deck Master, Dark Magician Girl, and Yugi's Dark Magician, Téa gains enough confidence to win.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey faces the Big 5's lawyer, Johnson, in a courtroom duel. Joey pulls an early lead with his Deck Master, Flame Swordsman, but Johnson's Deck Master, Judge Man, has abilities of his own.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Joey attempts to pull through with several luck-based cards, but Johnson's cheating tactics ruin all his chances, until an angry Noah puts a stop to him.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: While working as a substitute teacher at a high school, Jonathan assigns an overweight girl to tutor a troubled baseball star.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark persuade a youngster with Down's Syndrome to join the Special Olympics.

programme.desc: A man whose son died in Vietnam learns that he has an Amerasian grandson.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A children's-show host has a warm-hearted TV persona but is actually a cynic at heart.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark work to keep the three couples together.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A 12-year-old genius at college is treated like a social outcast by his less intelligent but more socially adept schoolmates.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A wealthy businessman would like to bridge the gap between himself and his son.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan tries to convince a powerful senator to restore severe budget cuts dealing with health-care. However, the assignment seems doomed when the senator suffers a fatal heart attack.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan's assignment at Christmas is to show a disillusioned columnist that there's still good out there.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark pose as priests in order to reopen an abandoned church as a shelter when a major fire breaks out in a neighborhood.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A struggling pianist tries to start life again after a heart attack.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: High school seniors hope they get the dates they want for prom.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark visit a halfway house for people who were confined to mental facilities but released because they were deemed no longer a danger to society.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A Vietnam vet is denied government assistance, despite having lost a leg and an arm.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark work as police detectives in a school. Their assignment: to investigate drug selling.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A fisherman's livelihood is in jeopardy because of the amount of time he devotes to his comatose son.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A lonely spy-story writer buys her murdered hero's sports car, which comes complete with his ghost.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A cold-hearted businessman is given the opportunity to relive the last week of his life. And he tries to do the right thing this time.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The orphan boy has formed an attachment to the dog, although he is going away to living with a new foster family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A trainer is reminded of his own shady past when a fighter he's been mentoring is asked to take a fall.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: On Halloween, Jonathan helps a little boy get over his fears and in the process get even with his sister!

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan casts a retired comic and his movie-star son in a play about a father and son who never got to know each other.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A youngster turns to a fantasy world and a comic-book superhero to cope with the pain of his father's death.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: An athlete who expects to gain his sight must counsel another man who is certain to lose his.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The patriarch of a ranch family feels he's too old to rein in some wild horses.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A cop is working undercover at a school to put an end to drug use, but faces suspension because of a mistake Mark has made.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: At Christmastime, Jonathan and Mark try to get a divorced couple to work together for their son's sake. Meanwhile, the holiday may be in jeopardy when a department store Santa is arrested.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Four brothers go on the run to escape a court order that would split them up.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A district attorney clashes with a lawyer who agrees to defend a friend charged with stealing.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark returns to Oakland to become a police officer again, and is reunited with his old partner. However, he discovers his old beat has become a storm of racial hatred.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan hopes that he'll be released from his duties to be reunited with his wife when she passes away.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A Hawaiian singer learns to overcome self-pity after being disabled in a truck accident.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help a teenage cancer patient named Lee who wants to save the dolphins.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Lee's cancer is now in remission. She gets back to work on her save-the-dolphins campaign.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan must stop an angel who's back on Earth with the intention of breaking up his son's marriage.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark's friend is running for public office, and he's a very honest man. But things get out of hand when an opponent tries to win by going after his son.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan helps Commander Michaels to deal with flashbacks of Vietnam; he also tries to convince her to go to therapy. Mark deals with his fear of flying.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A veterans' support group becomes a lifeline for Commander Michaels, who continues to deal with post-traumatic stress disorder. Meanwhile, she discovers that her son David came into the emergency room due to an accident.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A pastor must follow a council's decision to fire some staff at the school because they're not Christian.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A teenage girl tells school reporters that a driver came on to her right before the bus got into an accident. She may not be telling the truth. Jonathan tries to teach the news writers the correct way to report a story.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The problems of the handicapped are addressed when an amputee joins a crusade after a false fire alarm.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mr. Zelinka is a beloved teacher who is being forced to retire because he's old. Jonathan and Mark know that he would prefer to continue teaching.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: The parents of two Vietnamese children come to America to look for them after a ten-year separation.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A young man decides to institutionalize his brother who has been completely paralyzed for many years.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark believes that God has turned Jonathan into a dog. Meanwhile, he must contend with a runaway kid and the kid's scatterbrained mother.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: On Christmas Eve, Jonathan shows three men what will happen in the future if the Earth continues to be ravaged by pollution. One of the men is an energy official another is a farmer and the third one is the President.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: In the series opener, we meet Jonathan Smith, a probationary angel who has been sent to help people on Earth. He befriends residents at a retirement home. The administrator at the home has a brother named Mark who is suspicious of Jonathan.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan helps a terminally ill boy and his mother. Meanwhile, Mark deals with a thief abandoned by his folks.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark help aging movie heroes to stand up to a street gang known as Satan's Helpers. They persuade a young boxer not to throw a big fight when the gang tries to bully him.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark assist a young country singer who is hoping to follow in her mother's footsteps. Next, they help a widow mourning her late husband.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan must find a way to help Deke, a college football star whose dreams of reaching the pros are shattered by a tragic motorcycle accident.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: A construction tycoon believes he's King Arthur and his estranged son wants him declared incompetent.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan has been hired to look after the kids of a movie star who never has time to spend with his family.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Mark has fallen in love with an attractive woman, but Jonathan receives news about her from higher up.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are bellhops at a hotel that has been given to an aimless young man by his father. They must deal with an unkind boss, an obnoxious kid and a difficult guest.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark try to help a heartless used car salesman reconsider his actions on Christmas Eve.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark investigate a gang of drug smugglers after an old friend of Mark's has disappeared.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan attempts to fan the flames of love between a woman and her ex-husband's best friend. But his efforts backfire when he falls for the woman himself.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan steps in when a heart condition sidelines a promising basketball player's dreams.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Jonathan and Mark are on hand when a dying woman attempts a reconciliation with her estranged father.

programme.title: Highway to Heaven
programme.desc: Scotty is a lovelorn quadriplegic with a successful law practice. And Jonathan is happy to play cupid.

programme.desc: Kun osa miehistöstä vangitaan, Harper joutuu työskentelemään Patriarkan aikasillalla.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kun Rommie muuttuu liian tunteelliseksi, alus katkaisee hänen pääsynsä diagnostiikan suorittamiseksi.

programme.desc: Andromeda pelastaa aluksen, joka palaa rauhanneuvotteluista Magogin kanssa.

programme.desc: Beka jätetään Seefraan Andromedan varastamisen jälkeen, ja Dylanin on todistettava, että alus on hänen.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka voittaa palkinnon radio-DJ:ltä, saa tietää totuuden Seefrasta ja löytää Meethus-kaavion.

programme.desc: Flavin palaa, mikä sytyttää jengisodan, ja auttaa Dylania kehittymään Paradinina.

programme.desc: Löydetään kristalli, joka voi palauttaa Andromedan voiman, mutta saadakseen sen Dylanin on työskenneltävä kaivoksen omistajalle.

programme.desc: Seefrasta löydetään tunneleita, joiden kautta voi päästä kahdeksalle muulle Seefra-planeetalle.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kun vanha mies tapetaan, Beka, Rhade ja Harper ovat pää epäiltyjä ja joutuvat oikeuteen.

programme.desc: Rhade johtaa kapinallisia taistelussa Seefra-5:n sotapäällikköä vastaan.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka ja Rhade joutuvat koetukselle, joka joko antaa heille suuren rikkauden tai ajaa heidät hulluuteen.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Harper löytää ohjelman, joka voi tuhota kahdeksan Seefra-planeettaa ja tappaa miljoonia ihmisiä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Samalla kun Harper yrittää pelastaa Seefra-järjestelmän, vakooja hiipii Andromedalle ja hyökkää Bekan kimppuun.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Seefran vilkkuva aurinko yritetään korjata, mutta Trance korvataan kaksoisolennolla.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Rommie rakennetaan uudelleen auttamaan Seefra-järjestelmän evakuoinnissa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Sotapäällikkö vakuuttaa seuraajilleen, että ulkoplaneettojen lähestyvä tuho on juoni, jonka tarkoituksena on helpottaa heidän planeettansa ryöstämistä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan, Rhade ja Beka työskentelevät yhdessä pelastaakseen Trancen Methus-2:lta ja Harperin kenraali Burmalta.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Miehistö pääsee lopulta pois Seefra-järjestelmästä ja saa selville, että Dylan on viimeinen Paradine.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Mustan aukon lähelle jäänyt kapteeni Dylan Hunt joutuu palkkasoturien pelastusaluksen jäljille ja huomaa, että hänet on jäädytetty ajassa 300 vuodeksi.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan suojelee Andromedaa palkkasotureilta, kun taas Beka alkaa miettiä, taistelevatko he väärällä puolella.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan löytää avaruusaseman, joka on täynnä lapsia, jotka uskovat, että hänen tehtävänään on tuoda rauha tappamalla heidän vihollisensa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromedan miehistö opettelee yhä työskentelemään yhdessä, kun Restorersit hyökkäävät heidän kimppuunsa.

programme.desc: Hätäkutsuun vastaaminen johtaa miehistön hakemaan Bekan veljen, joka on nykyään Wayist, ja hänen ystävänsä.

programme.desc: Mustan aukon ansiosta Dylan voi kommunikoida entisen morsiamensa kanssa 300 vuotta taaksepäin.

programme.desc: Dylan on vangittuna vankiplaneetalla, ja hänen on järjestettävä pako, kun hänen miehistönsä yrittää järjestää oman pelastuksensa.

programme.desc: Kastalialaiset nousevat Andromedalle viimeistelläkseen uuden kansainyhteisön peruskirjan. Kun johtaja löydetään kuolleena, Tyr on pääepäilty.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda löytää sisaraluksensa Pax Magellanicin. Paxin miehistö on 300 vuotta vanha... mutta ei ole ikääntynyt päivässä.

programme.desc: Tyr syöksyy Eureka Maru -aluksella maahan Nietzscheanin planeetalla ja menettää muistinsa.

programme.desc: Harper saa tiedon lahjan kuolevalta Perseidiltä, mutta huomaa, että Perseidiä etsi palkkionmetsästäjä.

programme.desc: Dylan pidätetään diktaattorin salamurhasta 300 vuotta sitten.

programme.title: Andromeda

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan ja pastori Bem auttavat rauhanomaista yhteiskuntaa vastustamaan mahdollisia orjakauppiaita, mutta heidän on oltava varovaisia.

programme.desc: Rommien avatar rakastuu Gabriel-nimisen sota-aluksen avatariin. Gabriel yrittää tartuttaa Rommieen viruksen, joka lähettää suunnitelmansa sota-alukselle.

programme.desc: Vanha muisto Andromedalta aktivoituu vahingossa, mikä lähettää hänet tehtävään ja jättää Dylanin miehistön ohella kykenemättömäksi kumoamaan komennon.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylanin ja Rommien on pelastettava Tyr, Harper ja Rev Magogin maailmalaivalta.

programme.desc: Seefrasta löydetään tunneleita, joiden kautta voi päästä kahdeksalle muulle Seefra-planeetalle.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kun vanha mies tapetaan, Beka, Rhade ja Harper ovat pää epäiltyjä ja joutuvat oikeuteen.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Rhade johtaa kapinallisia taistelussa Seefra-5:n sotapäällikköä vastaan.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka ja Rhade joutuvat koetukselle, joka joko antaa heille suuren rikkauden tai ajaa heidät hulluuteen.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Harper löytää ohjelman, joka voi tuhota kahdeksan Seefra-planeettaa ja tappaa miljoonia ihmisiä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Samalla kun Harper yrittää pelastaa Seefra-järjestelmän, vakooja hiipii Andromedalle ja hyökkää Bekan kimppuun.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Seefran vilkkuva aurinko yritetään korjata, mutta Trance korvataan kaksoisolennolla.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Rommie rakennetaan uudelleen auttamaan Seefra-järjestelmän evakuoinnissa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Sotapäällikkö vakuuttaa seuraajilleen, että ulkoplaneettojen lähestyvä tuho on juoni, jonka tarkoituksena on helpottaa heidän planeettansa ryöstämistä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan, Rhade ja Beka työskentelevät yhdessä pelastaakseen Trancen Methus-2:lta ja Harperin kenraali Burmalta.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Miehistö pääsee lopulta pois Seefra-järjestelmästä ja saa selville, että Dylan on viimeinen Paradine.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Mustan aukon lähelle jäänyt kapteeni Dylan Hunt joutuu palkkasoturien pelastusaluksen jäljille ja huomaa, että hänet on jäädytetty ajassa 300 vuodeksi.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan suojelee Andromedaa palkkasotureilta, kun taas Beka alkaa miettiä, taistelevatko he väärällä puolella.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan löytää avaruusaseman, joka on täynnä lapsia, jotka uskovat, että hänen tehtävänään on tuoda rauha tappamalla heidän vihollisensa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromedan miehistö opettelee yhä työskentelemään yhdessä, kun Restorersit hyökkäävät heidän kimppuunsa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Liukuvirta lähettää Andromedan ajassa taaksepäin juuri ennen Kansainyhteisön kaatumista. Miehistön on puututtava asiaan säilyttääkseen historian.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Hätäkutsuun vastaaminen johtaa miehistön hakemaan Bekan veljen, joka on nykyään Wayist, ja hänen ystävänsä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Mustan aukon ansiosta Dylan voi kommunikoida entisen morsiamensa kanssa 300 vuotta taaksepäin.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan on vangittuna vankiplaneetalla, ja hänen on järjestettävä pako, kun hänen miehistönsä yrittää järjestää oman pelastuksensa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kastalialaiset nousevat Andromedalle viimeistelläkseen uuden kansainyhteisön peruskirjan. Kun johtaja löydetään kuolleena, Tyr on pääepäilty.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda löytää sisaraluksensa Pax Magellanicin. Paxin miehistö on 300 vuotta vanha... mutta ei ole ikääntynyt päivässä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Tyr syöksyy Eureka Maru -aluksella maahan Nietzscheanin planeetalla ja menettää muistinsa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Harper saa tiedon lahjan kuolevalta Perseidiltä, mutta huomaa, että Perseidiä etsi palkkionmetsästäjä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan pidätetään diktaattorin salamurhasta 300 vuotta sitten.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Gerentex on palannut, ja hän vaatii Trancen ja Harperin apua uudessa suunnitelmassaan: Tarn-Vedran löytämisessä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan ja pastori Bem auttavat rauhanomaista yhteiskuntaa vastustamaan mahdollisia orjakauppiaita, mutta heidän on oltava varovaisia.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan yrittää tuoda rauhaa kahteen eri Nietzschean ylpeyteen saattamalla toisen prinsessan järjestettyyn avioliittoon toisen prinssin kanssa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Rommien avatar rakastuu Gabriel-nimisen sota-aluksen avatariin. Gabriel yrittää tartuttaa Rommieen viruksen, joka lähettää suunnitelmansa sota-alukselle.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Vanha muisto Andromedalta aktivoituu vahingossa, mikä lähettää hänet tehtävään ja jättää Dylanin miehistön ohella kykenemättömäksi kumoamaan komennon.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylanin ja Rommien on pelastettava Tyr, Harper ja Rev Magogin maailmalaivalta.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan, Beka, Rev ja Tyr syöksyvät maahan paettuaan nietzscheläisten jengiä, mutta kohtaavat pian uuden uhan: Revin tarve saada ruokaa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Miehistön on varastettava jalokivi, joka on Driftin omistajan ja Thanin välisen riidan keskipisteenä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Miehistö etsii kauan kadoksissa ollutta kansainyhteisön johtajaa, joka on mennyt piiloon.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan, Beka ja Trance lähtevät Rommien kanssa ottamaan selvää aseesta, jota kehitetään planeetalla, joka ei luota tekoälyyn.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromedan tehtävänä on saattaa lääkintäaluksia turvallisesti Drago-Kazovin avaruuden läpi.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylanin entisen morsiamen johtama Kansainyhteisön selviytyjistä koostuva planeetta kutsutaan liittymään uuteen Kansainyhteisöön.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Abyssin agentti yrittää houkutella Harperin liittymään Magogiin.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan ja hänen uusi Kansainyhteisön laivastonsa ottavat vastaan Drago-Kazovin laivaston, mutta huomaavat sen olevan paljon odotettua suurempi.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Harperin Magogin munat alkavat kuoriutua, joten ryhmä rakentaa Teseract-koneen.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan ottaa haltuunsa turistiproomun yrittäessään paeta palkkasotureita.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Ruumiin tunnistaminen menee pieleen, kun käy ilmi, että Bekan entinen miehistötoveri ei olekaan kuollut.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Luomisen moottori pystyy kirjoittamaan maailmankaikkeuden uudelleen omistajan toiveiden mukaisesti.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Musta aukko tyrmää Dylanin ja lähettää hänet vaihtoehtoiseen todellisuuteen, jossa hänellä on vaimo ja lapsi.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Miehistö pelastaa yhden kauan kadonneista Commonwealth-perustajista, mutta huomaa, että hänellä voi olla enemmän ongelmia kuin hän on arvoltaan.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Mytologinen avaruushirviö yrittää syödä Andromedan.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Geniitit hyökkäävät Tyrin vaimon ja siirtokunnan kimppuun.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan isännöi viidenkymmenen osapuolen kanssa Uuden Kansainyhteisön peruskirjan allekirjoittamista, mutta huomaa pian, että tunkeilijat aikovat estää allekirjoittamisen.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka ja Tyr joutuvat ulottuvuustunnelin energian valtaan. Dylanin, Trancen ja Harperin on pelastettava heidät ennen kuin he tuhoavat aluksen.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan lavastetaan syylliseksi murhaan, ja hänen on puhdistettava nimensä ja löydettävä samalla maljakon osat, joiden sanotaan antavan omistajalleen "kosmoksen siunaukset".

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Miehistö pelastaa pakolaisryhmän, mutta huomaa, että he ovat joutuneet hallituksen kokeisiin ja ovat äärimmäisen epävakaita.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kun avaruusrosvot hyökkäävät Andromedan kimppuun, heidät pelastaa kauan sitten kadonnut avaruusalus Maasta.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Miehistö saa selville, että Marduk-planeetta on luonut joukkotuhoaseita.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Leper niminen palkkamurhaaja on ottanut kohteekseen Uuden Kansainyhteisön johtajat.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromedaa vainoaa salaperäinen olento, joka tulee alukselle aurinkomyrskyn aikana.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Sijaitsee vaihtoehtoisessa universumissa, jossa Dylan kuoli ja Gaheris Rhade yrittää uudistaa kansainyhteisöä.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Ryhmä, joka hyökkäsi Andromedan kimppuun kansainyhteisön ensimmäisen peruskirjan allekirjoittamisen aikana, palaa aiheuttamaan lisää tuhoa.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Trance käy läpi useita eri skenaarioita ja yrittää löytää sellaisen, jossa hänen miehistötoverinsa eivät kuole.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Tehokkaampi Andromedan alus räjähtää todennäköisen sabotaasin vuoksi, ja Dylanin miehistön on pakko pelastaa heidät.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda saa avunhuudon Rev Bamilta.

programme.title: Andromeda
programme.desc: Kun Pyrianin pyroformerit hyökkäävät Kansainyhteisön planeetalle, Dylan joutuu taistelemaan uuden planeetan suojelemiseksi.

programme.title: Mommy Would Never Hurt You
programme.desc: Riley wants to rebuild her bond with her mom and sick sister, but uncovers a secret that changes everything.

programme.title: Alter
programme.desc: Alter, a psychological thriller about a man who is convinced that he’s found his childhood abductor, and is determined to get him to confess by any means necessary.

programme.title: Her Boyfriend's Secret
programme.desc: After believing she has found the guy of her dreams, Melissa soon learns that her dream man has a dark secret.

programme.title: Love Map
programme.desc: A self-assured relationship columnist is sent on assignment with a prickly tour guide to Florida.

programme.title: Intimate Stranger
programme.desc: Karen, the beautiful single mother of precious 9-year-old Justin, never really had much luck with love. This all seems to change when she falls for her “Prince Charming”, Dennis, who is both a caring gentleman and a great friend to her son. But her perfect world begins to crumble when she finds a black rose on her doorstep, hears noises in the attic and gets prank calls in the middle of the night. After breaking up with Dennis her life begins to turn upside down and strange things start happening. Questioning her own sanity and left alone by authorities, friends and family, she decides to take matters into her own hands- a dangerous decision that puts her life on the line…

programme.title: His Secret Past
programme.desc: Popular crime novelist, Jennifer Becker lives a lavish life in a small coastal town in California with her daughter, Lily. One day, while out for a run, Lily is attacked--but then rescued by a mysterious stranger named Mick.

programme.title: Deadly Patient
programme.desc: A patient mistakes his doctor's compassion for adoration and becomes dangerously obsessed.

programme.title: Deadly Vows
programme.desc: Pastry chef Helena poisons men who don't meet her standards, but Helena's fiancé's sister smells danger.

programme.title: Eve of Abduction
programme.desc: When a single mother gets engaged, she receives a threat—break off the engagement or her daughter is kidnapped.

programme.title: Blood Ties
programme.desc: Astaroth is back and possesses Coreen’s body in an attempt to get closer to Vicki.

programme.title: Love on Harbor Island
programme.desc: Sparks fly between an interior designer and a handsome pilot who finds homes for rescue dogs.

programme.desc: A self-assured relationship columnist is sent on assignment with a prickly tour guide to Florida.

programme.desc: A couple is threatened when Jessica, the driver from their past accident, moves in next door seeking revenge.

programme.desc: A lawyer is riding high after putting a receiving a Not Guilty verdict for her client, but has to look over her shoulder when a woman she meets in a traffic accident is not all she appears to be.

programme.title: Kidnapped to the Island
programme.desc: When a teen aspiring to be a pop star disappears, her mom tracks her down, uncovering a sinister plot.

programme.title: Love & Where to Find It
programme.desc: Two local coffee shop owners despise each other but begin to fall in love while sending each other messages on their friends' behalf.

programme.title: Ex Next Door
programme.desc: A happy couple’s life turns upside down when the husband’s ex-girlfriend moves in next door.

programme.title: Killer Reputation
programme.desc: A PR maven takes pride in her reputation, but she risks it to help a star accused of killing his ex-wife.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori is throwing a Christmas party in the middle of summer.

programme.title: The Song to My Heart
programme.desc: An organic tea shop owner helps a music sensation write lyrics for a new solo album.
